name: Kelly Dietrich
subject: [Sneak peek] Our new cohort program! 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Training Committee,
body:
📣 calling all future field directors...

NDTC-Logo
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiYm9ueGpiejE3ZmgwdjhpYjRnNzEiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vTG94Qzk5Ym01NC9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjA5MjFfRFNJX1NpZ251cFx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9 )

Peter — Kelly here with some exciting news.

So exciting, in fact, that we want to share it with you a little
ahead of schedule.

It’s hard to find qualified applicants to fill your field
leadership roles.

That’s why we’re proud to launch The Democratic Strategy
Institute’s (DSI) Field Director Training Cohort.

DSI Field Director Training Cohort is a FREE, 8-week program
designed to train the next generation of Field Directors.

The goal is to help talented field organizers level-up their
careers and drive change in their communities.

Sounds great, right? If you or someone you know would make a
perfect fit for this cohort, click here to learn more and join
the waitlist!
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiYm9ueGpiejE3ZmgwdjhpYjRnNzEiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vdkdxQndPNEp2aC9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjA5MjFfRFNJX1NpZ251cFx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9 )

GO NOW →
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiYm9ueGpiejE3ZmgwdjhpYjRnNzEiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vdHAzWlhJZTlxZS9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjA5MjFfRFNJX1NpZ251cFx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9 )

Peter we need your help to make this inaugural cohort a
huge success.

We’re looking for folks who have at least two cycles of field
organizing experience, love uniting a community around a
candidate or cause, and are ready to take their skills to the
next level.

Does this sound like you? Or maybe someone in your network?

Then please, take a moment to join the waitlist and/or forward
this email to at least three friends who are looking to become
leaders in campaign field work!
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiYm9ueGpiejE3ZmgwdjhpYjRnNzEiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vYTVJdkV5WkhlaS9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjA5MjFfRFNJX1NpZ251cFx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9 )

JOIN THE WAITLIST →
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhY2NvdW50X2lkIjoiODg5NDIyNyIsImRlbGl2ZXJ5X2lkIjoiYm9ueGpiejE3ZmgwdjhpYjRnNzEiLCJ1cmwiOiJodHRwczovL2VvYWNsay5jb20vMWNVbllWRXJHUC9kcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbS8_dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1ORFRDXHUwMDI2dXRtX21lZGl1bT1FbWFpbFx1MDAyNnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0wNjA5MjFfRFNJX1NpZ251cFx1MDAyNl9fcz1vNGJtdWFxam9sYzNxaGRxdmlzeSJ9 )

By joining the waitlist, you’ll be one of the first people to
know when our application portal goes live on Monday, June 14!

Thank you in advance for making this a huge success, and stay
tuned for more as we get closer to launching applications.

— Kelly

Kelly Dietrich
Founder / CEO of NDTC

P.S. — In selecting this cohort, we’ll prioritize those who
historically haven’t been represented in campaign leadership. We
strongly encourage leaders who are women, people of color, and
transgender and non-binary to apply.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com ( # ) |

clean_body: | | | | | This is dangerous — take a look at this headline: This is what the Republican party has come to: A fractured group of extremists -- from QAnon conspiracytheorists, to violent “Proud Boys,” to anti-democracy insurrections. And now, they’re trying to establish leadership right here in Nevada. Not on our watch. At Elect Nevada Democrats, we’re working day and night to elect Democrats who will fight for the future of ALL Nevadans. We’re fighting for health care, economic growth, climate action, and true justice for all. Extremists like the Proud Boys in Clark County jeopardize that mission. | | | | | | | | | | | | | It’s time for action. We need to do everything we can to prevent dangerous extremists from gaining any more power in our democracy. But it’s going to take a concerted effort from all of us — because they’re not going away without a fight. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for standing up for what’s right, Elect Nevada Democrats | | If you'd like to support Elect Nevada Democrats, you can | Paid for by Home Means Nevada PAC. I'm so thankful for your support.

With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward.

But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. |

**As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities.**

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: Joe Manchin
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Here's a promise. If I get to the U.S. Senate, I'll be 100% on board with saving our democracy.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210609-1712-header&t=1&akid=1712%2E434096%2E6JuqSW)
Peter,
So it looks like Joe Manchin is a "no" vote on the For the People Act.
I truly don't get it.
**We're talking about a simple bill that the vast majority of Americans support.** It's a no-brainer as Republican lawmakers across the country try to systematically disenfranchise people to rig elections in their favor.
**Call me old fashioned, but I think Democrats should vote like Democrats.** We don't need to be so concerned with how Republican senators will vote — we just need to vote for what's right for the American people.
**Here's a promise: If I get to the U.S. Senate, I'll be 100% on board with saving our democracy.** I'll never base my vote on which way I think other senators are going to go — I'll just do what I know to be right.
Without flipping more seats blue, we won't be able to toss the filibuster and get things done. That makes our race even more important. [**So, I'm asking for your help right now: Can you chip in your first $5 to help flip PA and save our democracy?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/19873?refcode=em20210609-1712&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=1712%2E434096%2E6JuqSW)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/19873?refcode=em20210609-1712&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=1712%2E434096%2E6JuqSW)**
I am truly, truly grateful for all the support you've given our campaign so far. If millions of people here in Pennsylvania and across the country donate, volunteer, and spread the word, I'm confident we will win. And when we do, I'll go to the Senate and fight for our democracy as hard as I can. I guarantee it.
Thanks for everything,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210609-1712-footer&t=22&refcode2=1712_434096_6JuqSW&akid=1712%2E434096%2E6JuqSW)**
---

Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

name: Jim Jordan
subject: I have some bad news to share
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. Will you take a moment to cast yours now?

|
---

Peter,

Recently my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. More pointedly, **[we asked you to weigh in on whether or not you consider President Trump the leader of the Republican Party.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58215900:WlPDTHddN:m:1:2247059263:7B1D034E05C3564F9B7933BE6090FDBA:r)**

My team just delivered a preliminary report to me and we're not seeing the results we were hoping for. **We set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to vote in our poll - the more votes the more accurate the findings - and we're coming up 1,000 votes short. **

Peter, your name is not on my list as having voted. **[Would you do me a personal favor and cast your vote in my poll before midnight tonight?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58215900:WlPDTHddN:m:1:2247059263:7B1D034E05C3564F9B7933BE6090FDBA:r)**

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58215900:WlPDTHddN:m:1:2247059263:7B1D034E05C3564F9B7933BE6090FDBA:r)
* **_no response will result in an automatic *NO* selction*_**
You see, the earlier we can determine the direction in which Republican voters want the party to go - and the leaders who voters want to be at the helm -- _**the sooner we can fine-tune our plans to help take back the House majority in next year's midterm elections**_.

We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. **[Will you take a moment to cast yours now?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58215900:WlPDTHddN:m:1:2247059263:7B1D034E05C3564F9B7933BE6090FDBA:r)**

We need to know whether or not you're going to stand with our Party leadership - **including President Trump** - as we work to take back the house from socialist-sympathizing Democrats next year.

| [**Take My Trump Poll Today ➔**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58215900:WlPDTHddN:m:1:2247059263:7B1D034E05C3564F9B7933BE6090FDBA:r)
---

For freedom,
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/58215900:WlPDTHddN:m:1:2247059263:7B1D034E05C3564F9B7933BE6090FDBA:r)
Jim Jordan

_We'd hate to see you go but if you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWlPDTHddN)****_
| Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress

Delaware, OH 43015

body:
Keystone Progress wants to talk to you
| | | | | _Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://leftaction.salsalabs.org/key-e_copy1?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_

| | | Hi Friend, Our partners at Keystone Progress want to talk to you about their work to support Progressives in Pennsylvania. We think this work is critical, particularly as we approach so many upcoming Judicial elections in November in PA. We’d strongly encourage you to hear what they have to say. **[If you do not want to receive communications from them, simply click on this link, and you will not receive them.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0f9a5111-1855-4aab-b540-bc8028e86fa6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Otherwise, you will receive them, but always have the opportunity to unsubscribe immediately. Here's more about this effort: _**Every single day, Keystone Progress works to build powerful coalitions that protect our democracy and hold the powerful accountable for their actions. **_ _To do this, we collaborate with communities across the state of Pennsylvania around issues like reproductive rights, environmental justice, and criminal justice reform. We work to elect progressive candidates, help the people organize, and offer public education through our nonprofit arm, the Keystone Progress Education Fund. _ **This effort is key, and we'd strongly encourage you to give Keystone Progress a chance to explain why.** Thanks for your support, and for fighting back! Sincerely, The Left Action team

body:
"Trump and Giuliani ask judge to drop Capitol riot conspiracy case"

This is what we're up against, team.

Karen vowed to hold President Donald Trump accountable in the wake of the January 6 insurrection. She kept her word, and now, she's suing Trump and his personal lawyer Rudolph Giuliani.

Trump and his allies must be brought to justice for shamelessly conspiring to overturn a free and fair election -- and for putting countless American lives and _our democracy_ in danger in the process.

Will you add your name now to support Karen's fight to hold Donald Trump accountable?](https://act.myngp.com/el/bjGcEguzy62rTsCOxhgd4a1t8HdbfSz_eFoCWfOC588=/Go9U4KZNxEo3_aoMHvSyDm-YDRscxnwhtnr2tp1m0Us=?gpsid=39_132_19304&ms=em21_210609_lwsut_engg_gq_act__tb_ettx&refcode=em21_210609_lwsut_engg_gq_act__tb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210609_lwsut_engg_gq_act__tb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

name: Anthony Sabatini
subject: The Establishment is erasing Trump's name & legacy from history! Help me stop them!
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c119%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=plrwe6CCfAHzQjPk9OfsOg&sysid=1)

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3074%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C8uO0LAYn%2fFadgqcT17xqw&sysid=1)

Friend,

My name is Anthony Sabatini, and I am a proud America-First champion, Trump supporter, and conservative fighter running for Congress in Florida.

I am emailing to tell how the Establishment is attempting to ERASE Donald Trump’s name from the history books!

I serve in the Florida statehouse and proposed renaming Florida's longest road to “The President Donald J. Trump Highway”. The goal is to create a highway from coast to coast honoring our greatest President.

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3074%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=C8uO0LAYn%2fFadgqcT17xqw&sysid=1)

Grassroots support for the bill EXPLODED! Over 25,000 people signed my petition and began demanding we rename the highway to honor one of our country's greatest presidents.

What did so-called, "Republican Leadership" do with the bill?

These RINO's decided to throw Trump supporters under the bus and killed the bill.

Even worse, they refused to even hear the bill in committee!

**Make no mistake: The Establishment is attempting to erase President Trump's name from the history books and destroy his legacy. **

I will NOT allow this to happen.

[**Please donate $20.22, $35, $50, $100, $250 to help me fight for Donald Trump’s legacy and Make America First!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3085%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LjeLGkIpnWFTlBmowa6Zgg&sysid=1)

[**Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3086%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tQTbrMdwlN8ZHnFBnei43w&sysid=1)

I am not afraid to stand up for President Trump and the America-First agenda.

This is what I am fighting for:

* Term Limits on ALL politicians
* Building the wall
* Banning Men from playing in girls’ sports
* Defeating Big Tech and cancel culture
* Draining the Swamp

[**Friend, please help me make the Donald Trump Highway a real possibility by donating to my campaign today >>>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c3087%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=F32j162DLRE0DSTQ6Ijcmg&sysid=1)

Thank you,

Anthony Sabatini
America-First Candidate for Congress
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_

name: Joe Collins for Congress
subject: Hunter Biden Will Destroy America Because of This
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Collins for Congress | 5777 CENTURY BLVD, STE 1110-143, Los Angeles, CA 90045
body:
2024 Can't Get Here Soon Enough
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HazWVWWoUZUrFmIWDiKca2SgcXv6bBPFQO69RNjmAi5BX58UPaahMrB4DKAhWjbC42E95oHuTvuiiVKUbIgYmlXQrJT_RhFQwCJqxP9Crxe5kEgDaxfuKNLJOlLL-PmL6uIm5MLfJiW_RykTkNnccICoZZbA_TUtTw1L_dlVMpZLTxh8DJ8-kT3cAB27bP-o&c=WbYFkBlpg--FRU6Xceps13_JEnVA7nQt-rZt-qw1t2EFQwwuISRdsg==&ch=PFSYDzReu3iNPQukyIvX5e7eH7i9-aLGm9hDsCoBGiPnhAjQs7XdbA==&jrc=1)
---
| | |
---
| Hello Peter,
---
| Former President Trump did great foreign policy work, especially with countries like North Korea and China. But Biden has set it all back, and there's a big reason for that: he is protecting his son, Hunter, as well as himself.
---
| | | [Click HERE to Save Our Country](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HazWVWWoUZUrFmIWDiKca2SgcXv6bBPFQO69RNjmAi5BX58UPaahMrB4DKAhWjbC42E95oHuTvuiiVKUbIgYmlXQrJT_RhFQwCJqxP9Crxe5kEgDaxfuKNLJOlLL-PmL6uIm5MLfJiW_RykTkNnccICoZZbA_TUtTw1L_dlVMpZLTxh8DJ8-kT3cAB27bP-o&c=WbYFkBlpg--FRU6Xceps13_JEnVA7nQt-rZt-qw1t2EFQwwuISRdsg==&ch=PFSYDzReu3iNPQukyIvX5e7eH7i9-aLGm9hDsCoBGiPnhAjQs7XdbA==&jrc=1)
---
| Our country, in fact, our world, has spent over a year fighting a virus that started in China. Our economy tanked, people lost their livelihoods, and their lives, and we need answers. China doesn't want to cooperate in any investigation, however, and Biden isn't going to make them.
As I said on Newsmax, "Trying to get the W.H.O. to do some type of investigative work into China and the origins of the coronavirus is like trying to get Kamala Harris to go to the U.S.-Mexico border: it's not gonna happen."
Joe Biden will never be tough on China, because his son, Hunter, was so wrapped up in Chinese business and he doesn't want him to be exposed.

body:
#

Earlier this week, Sean Hannity attacked me for calling Joe Manchin’s refusal to support abolishing the filibuster what it is: a vote to preserve Jim Crow. Check it out:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30570464/289951131/-799468273?refcode2=ce7b788d-fbc9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210610-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTdiNzg4ZC1mYmM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VUUFI0ssteXuJz3cRlnEUBOlbzQJHmjApEbcnDmjosI=)
(I’m the "Democratic Congressman" being referenced, if that wasn’t clear.)
Here’s the thing — I stand by my comments. And I’m hoping you’ll join me in sticking up to Sean Hannity by adding a contribution to my re-election campaign today. Please, if you’re able:
**[Pitch in $3, or whatever you can afford, to my re-election campaign today to show Sean Hannity we won’t back down until we abolish the filibuster.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30570465/289951133/-799468273?refcode2=ce7b788d-fbc9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210610-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTdiNzg4ZC1mYmM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VUUFI0ssteXuJz3cRlnEUBOlbzQJHmjApEbcnDmjosI=)**
Just so we’re clear, the filibuster was created by accident in the 1800s, and subsequently was used to block the passage of civil rights legislation.
**Today, it’s not much different.** Republicans continue to use the filibuster to block any bill that would make a real difference in the lives of the American people. Right now, they’re blocking the For the People Act, which would undo voter suppression in states like Georgia and Florida, as well as the Equality Act, a bill to extend Civil Rights Act protections to LGBTQ+ Americans. This obstruction will not stop until we abolish the filibuster.
I’m proud to serve in the House of Representatives, and I’ll never hesitate to call out legislators like Joe Manchin who use “bipartisan compromise” as an excuse to prevent democracy-saving legislation from passing. Sean Hannity won’t make me back down.
So please, if you’re able:
**[Pitch in $3, or whatever you can afford, to my re-election campaign today if you agree: we won’t back down until we abolish the filibuster.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30570466/289951135/-799468273?refcode2=ce7b788d-fbc9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210610-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTdiNzg4ZC1mYmM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VUUFI0ssteXuJz3cRlnEUBOlbzQJHmjApEbcnDmjosI=)**
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30570467/289951136/-254107743?refcode2=ce7b788d-fbc9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210610-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTdiNzg4ZC1mYmM5LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VUUFI0ssteXuJz3cRlnEUBOlbzQJHmjApEbcnDmjosI=)**
Thank you, as always, for your support.
I’ll never stop fighting for what’s right, and I know that we can abolish the filibuster if we keep the pressure on high.
Onward,
Mondaire

name: Team Youngkin
subject: It's Time We Stand with and Support our Veterans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Youngkin for Governor, Inc
body:
Supporting Virginia’s veterans has never been more important. They served us, and now, it is time for us to serve them.
|
---
> Patriots, Supporting Virginia’s veterans has never been more important. They served us, and now, it is time for us to serve them. If you stand with and support our veterans who make immeasurable contributions to our Commonwealth, then join us today in honoring their sacrifice and service as we work to make Virginia the most military friendly state in the Union.
---
---
* **Join the conversation** and let your network know you support our veterans by sharing the hashtag #VeteransForYoungkin and tagging @GlennYoungkin in your videos, photos, and written posts.
* **Help** spread the word about Glenn’s plan to eliminate the income tax on military retirement pay and expand the portability of professional business licenses to make it easier for active-duty spouses and veteran couples to relocate to Virginia.
* **Learn more** about how Glenn will help veterans in Virginia by visiting our website and following us on social media.
* **Make a donation** to help ensure Virginia elects a governor who supports our veterans.

Sincerely, Team Youngkin

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Cybersecurity isn't a partisan issue, it's a national security issue
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

It might not seem like the most exciting topic to discuss right now, but the truth is: shoring up our nation's cybersecurity needs to be a priority for all of us.

Remember a few weeks ago when hackers targeted a pipeline, shutting off access to fuel for many people in our country? In recent weeks, we've also seen attacks on our food supply, our utilities, and even our hospitals.

These events were just the tip of the iceberg when it comes to cyber threats against our nation. **Cyber attacks can hurt our emergency response services, election systems, electrical grid, and much more.**

I helped introduce legislation last month to address this security threat. My bill, the State and Local Cybersecurity Improvement Act, would provide increased funding for state, local, and tribal governments to counter threats and empower the Department of Homeland Security's Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency to support these local efforts.

**Cybersecurity isn 't a partisan issue, it's a national security issue.** I'm working with colleagues on both sides of the aisle to get this bill passed.

**[Will you join us in the fight to protect our country against cybersecurity threats? Add your name today to help advance this critical national security issue.](https://act.myngp.com/el/T8ZpgslyBURVGBnWXpY0rFpEy_k40dJlK620Gtd4m-U=/RvFIjnvGGcMjPyuhuK0FqDyH6w9sGzLS5no7HkD5ssk=?gpsid=50_115_19320&ms=em21_210609_Cyber_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&refcode=em21_210609_Cyber_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210609_Cyber_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)**

Thank you for standing with me, it's an honor to represent you,

Derek

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/T8ZpgslyBURVGBnWXpY0rFpEy_k40dJlK620Gtd4m-U=/r_8Wh_QX2XODTB4Kqtxs_HGeTHPFdwp6hjOkqEsKxc0=?gpsid=50_115_19321&refcode=em21_210609_Cyber_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210609_Cyber_adv_gq_act__DK_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dkil)

name: Maggie Hassan
subject: What Mike Pence said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
"We are on the verge of another great Republican comeback. It starts right here in New Hampshire...and we are going to [win back the Senate] in 2022" - Mike Pence | | |
---
**"We are on the verge of another great Republican comeback. It starts right here in New Hampshire...and we are going to [win back the Senate] in 2022."** | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30579957/289975969/1251890980?refcode=e20210610_mh-pence-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzBmZTQwOC0wOGNhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ecgEQWbS7yCvJAiiFi37zDfHrAECKYVtiwd2ADyYxTU=)
---
Hi,
Mike Pence was in New Hampshire last week for a massive GOP fundraiser, and I can’t get this quote out of my head.
Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back the majority and Mike Pence made it clear: they’re laser focused on New Hampshire.
My campaign is coming up on our big quarterly fundraising deadline, and my team just let me know that we had to reduce our projections because responses to emails like this one have slowed. **[With Pence and the GOP fully invested in this race, that’s really bad news. Will you please rush $5 or more right now to help make up ground?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30579958/289975970/1251890980?refcode=e20210610_mh-pence-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzBmZTQwOC0wOGNhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ecgEQWbS7yCvJAiiFi37zDfHrAECKYVtiwd2ADyYxTU=)**
Mitch McConnell, Mike Pence, and Donald Trump have a plan to flip the Senate, everyone. And, after losing this seat to me by just 1,017 votes in 2016, they’re hellbent on flipping it back this time around. But I have something they don’t: you.
We don’t need enormous checks to win, but we do need people like you to give $5 or what you can, when you can to show our strength. **[Look, your support is so important to me. Will you please donate $5 or as much as you can to protect our vulnerable Senate seat -- and Democrats’ fragile majority?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30579959/289975971/1251890980?refcode=e20210610_mh-pence-a&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4MzBmZTQwOC0wOGNhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ecgEQWbS7yCvJAiiFi37zDfHrAECKYVtiwd2ADyYxTU=)**
Thank you for helping. I appreciate it so much.
With every good wish,
Maggie Hassan

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: The fight for equal pay continues
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
We should be celebrating our progress on this equal pay anniversary -- but shamefully, Senate Republicans used a filibuster to block the passage of the Paycheck Fairness Act this week.
#
Peter,
On June 10, 1963, President Kennedy signed the Equal Pay Act into law. This was an important first step, but the reality is, the wage gap still exists and it’s still shortchanging women.
**I introduced the Paycheck Fairness Act to solve this issue. Our federal laws need urgent updates to ensure every worker is paid fairly for their work, regardless of who they are.**
We should be celebrating our progress on this equal pay anniversary -- but shamefully, Senate Republicans used a filibuster to block the passage of the Paycheck Fairness Act this week.
**[Peter, the fight to close the gender pay gap continues. Will you join me in telling the GOP that we can’t wait any longer? clean_body: We should be celebrating our progress on this equal pay anniversary -- but shamefully, Senate Republicans used a filibuster to block the passage of the Paycheck Fairness Act this week. Peter, On June 10, 1963, President Kennedy signed the Equal Pay Act into law. This was an important first step, but the reality is, the wage gap still exists and it’s still shortchanging women. I introduced the Paycheck Fairness Act to solve this issue. Our federal laws need urgent updates to ensure every worker is paid fairly for their work, regardless of who they are. We should be celebrating our progress on this equal pay anniversary -- but shamefully, Senate Republicans used a filibuster to block the passage of the Paycheck Fairness Act this week. On average, women in America are paid 82 cents for every dollar their male counterparts make -- and it’s even worse for women of color. That amounts to thousands of dollars a year that could go toward groceries, or housing, or child care, or getting an education, or saving for retirement. And after a pandemic and economic crisis that has disproportionately hurt working women, it’s more important than ever that we close the pay gap. I’ve been fighting for years to get the Paycheck Fairness Act across the finish line, and I’ll keep at it as long as it takes to ensure that everyone in Washington state and across the country gets paid fairly for their work. Thank you, Patty As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values. * PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

| | Derek, this is not a drill.

We’re only two days into the general election and Terry and Glenn Youngkin are already neck-and-neck in the polls AND fundraising.

We knew this would be difficult. From the beginning, analysts at Nate Silver’s _FiveThirtyEight_ have been calling this “the most competitive election of 2021.” _The Washington Post_ said that Republican nominee Glenn Youngkin has a “surprisingly good chance” of winning the Governor’s office. And now, _The Los Angeles Times_ is calling the Virginia Governor’s race a “Trump-Biden rematch.”

But with Donald Trump and Ted Cruz’s endorsements and Youngkin’s $75 million deep pockets, this already competitive race has been shot into the stratosphere.

clean_body: It’s right here in Virginia. | | | = | | Derek, this is not a drill. We’re only two days into the general election and Terry and Glenn Youngkin are already neck-and-neck in the polls AND fundraising. We knew this would be difficult. From the beginning, analysts at Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight have been calling this “the most competitive election of 2021.” The Washington Post said that Republican nominee Glenn Youngkin has a “surprisingly good chance” of winning the Governor’s office. And now, The Los Angeles Times is calling the Virginia Governor’s race a “Trump-Biden rematch.” But with Donald Trump and Ted Cruz’s endorsements and Youngkin’s $75 million deep pockets, this already competitive race has been shot into the stratosphere. name: Team Sarah
subject: re: For the People Act
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SARAH FOR WISCONSIN
body:
Hey, Peter,

102 years ago today, Wisconsin became the first state to ratify the 19th Amendment, granting some women the right to vote. Many Black women and women of color were denied access to the ballot box until the Voting Rights Act (VRA) of 1965.

In 2013, the Supreme Court gutted a key piece of the VRA allowing Republican-controlled state legislatures like Wisconsin's to make it harder to vote. And in the wake of the 2020 election, GOP state lawmakers across the country are trying to ram through 389 restrictive voting bills -- even going as far as making it illegal to give water to voters while they wait in line.

Here's the good news: we can pass historic legislation to permanently expand voting rights for everyone -- but it's stalled in the Senate.

It's this simple: we've got to pass the For the People Act. It will strengthen our election security, reform our campaign finance laws, end partisan gerrymandering, and so much more. Wisconsinites deserve a new Senator who will protect their voting rights -- not attack them. Ron Johnson isn’t going to get the job done, but Sarah will.

[**If you agree that it's time to make it easier to vote, end partisan gerrymandering, and get dark money out of politics, add your name to join Sarah Godlewski in calling on the Senate to pass the For the People Act.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30585615/289996707/-107823993?gpsid=31_130_19332&ms=em21_210610_HR1_engg_gq_act__ts_ettx&refcode=em21_210610_HR1_engg_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210610_HR1_engg_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sgod&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTNlNWU0NS0xOGNhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=haCFPKbJamS44QIzwO0cSUkRe0dwkUYxrwdMo2LGV-I=&emci=535991a7-0aca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=ca3e5e45-18ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18659593)

| Fellow Patriot, Do you know why the Left HATES me? You see, liberals think minorities like me should just shut up, and blindly support their efforts to destroy America with radical, socialist policies, and it... **...drives them insane that a young Hispanic woman like me who served as an appointed official in President Trump’s Administration is a proud, vocal America First conservative!** I’m sure it doesn’t surprise you to hear that so-called “** _tolerant_** ” Leftists constantly attack me on Twitter with threatening and harassing messages. **I can’t even go a day without being called a traitor to my race!** But I have bad news for the Left: **I’m a warrior who’ll never stop fighting for our MAGA principles, and I WILL NOT BACK DOWN or BE SILENCED!** _And[I’m writing to ask you to support my campaign](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=44bfc86cbd41472da320dfa375b9a8b8&_e=RmNsMCOHAutOvNt2TzT3GSh7grGpzLprfDZpXVbYl_pzhX0lhi_A_MJZXIQIiTZNBu8nZnH0pD4HbP7UJGNnjUmY5U3jBhD6fnGnN3MjNTzOxnG5cPNAQhFEQF4mz3k1dZVCHP41eYVWEy17qom65CKtp08WMJ4P_Y0YjDa-NTuN5lY3-txYMGJm9Vf7CIaGN9PZwKsyISgtXvJrHfHnxSdMUmRVg7fj_THUuQT_kXUUK8JmZ57MOHEU5xLEErYmKNFmaq8rxvMagUE6_TELEmB40a0jHIqrqMbvk_15D5BzAKLUwVMje2NKk6V7K2YNmnuSmDMXWuHcVsZVFD7s7A%3D%3D) against Liz Cheney’s fellow Never Trumper Adam Kinzinger to help me kick his RINO butt out of Congress!_ **[So, will you stand beside me and join my fight to defeat this Trump-hating RINO AND crush the Left’s socialist agenda with a generous gift today?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=44bfc86cbd41472da320dfa375b9a8b8&_e=RmNsMCOHAutOvNt2TzT3GSh7grGpzLprfDZpXVbYl_pzhX0lhi_A_MJZXIQIiTZNBu8nZnH0pD4HbP7UJGNnjUmY5U3jBhD6fnGnN3MjNTzOxnG5cPNAQhFEQF4mz3k145lJac6-W1EkhZAUmRT-mtT6PII2fXU177D6maJI1u-UL-WTziPthROvu1BTGxj-pxwcgEc8j-KXsanRrfYuH7aJL9QCc_wqztUNdWoM9BcKBI-ZJVbYVRgV4sy3i3KIjsOhEU5x_hB2ryKX2o4_KEUJKB6tkKvyqdNwY44VmRP-O-tHpGM_P-2EoHY9Qw7WlsliV4MymDBMkCII_fXQ3w%3D%3D)** [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=44bfc86cbd41472da320dfa375b9a8b8&_e=RmNsMCOHAutOvNt2TzT3GSh7grGpzLprfDZpXVbYl_pzhX0lhi_A_MJZXIQIiTZNBu8nZnH0pD4HbP7UJGNnjUmY5U3jBhD6fnGnN3MjNTzOxnG5cPNAQhFEQF4mz3k17KG6jyA2wWxiXiFMW64GtvFHUuwnb82ON8E9NuW5qpOPpPIIOCwN5KnXQXJ5ECbHJBiJ0Z7TBBsSTlGfmSyWu5jKZTWOR5MjqEODQrSNvaE3w7dEGZAPqXTdTvc3yOXDAaHuN5EsNNEmGqRMmR9XTvyNGnmzs3qpSJZFWiEPgm_sP0o-iDb6_518mUpOfebrk8iYOqXWe8LllYPHpoB2aQ%3D%3D) As a GOP turncoat, Adam Kinzinger is the Never Trump movement’s golden boy and the far-Left’s favorite Republican because he:
* **Voted** for Nancy Pelosi’s sham impeachment of President Trump,

* **Turns** his back on his patriotic constituents every chance he gets, AND

* **Spends** most of his time trashing pro-Trump conservatives like you and me with liberal pals like Chris Cuomo on Fake News CNN and MSNBC!

**As you and I both know, liberals are the true racists.** The Left HATES that conservatives like me and Senator Tim Scott exist! We cannot continue to make accommodations for white supremacy — but other candidates in this race have expressed nothing more than silence and skepticism.
#
Democrats control the House, the Senate, and the White House. Yet Senate Republicans continue using the filibuster to block critical legislation, and corporate Democrats like Joe Manchin refuse to end this racist procedural tool and Jim Crow era relic.
**Here’s my promise to you: Elect me to the U.S. Senate, and I’ll vote to abolish the Jim Crow filibuster once and for all.** We cannot continue to make accommodations for white supremacy — _but other candidates in this race have expressed nothing more than silence and skepticism._
[__](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2483?refcode=em20210610-159&t=1&akid=159%2E3698%2ElyfKn_)
**North Carolina’s open Senate seat will be critical in our moral fight to abolish the filibuster and pass urgently needed legislation. I’m the only candidate in this race who has the political will to get it done****.** [**Make a $5 contribution to our campaign to help us make real change.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2483?refcode=em20210610-159&t=2&akid=159%2E3698%2ElyfKn_)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2483?refcode=em20210610-159&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=159%2E3698%2ElyfKn_)**
**I will not be silent and skeptical** about a tool that was used to protect people who were lynching Black men and Black women like my grandparents.
**I will not be silent and skeptical** about a tool that was used to try to prevent my mom from the sacred act of casting her vote.
**I will not be silent and skeptical** about a tool that is enabling attacks on voting rights, that is condemning workers to starvation wages, that is keeping our roads unpaved, and our world on a path to climate catastrophe.
[**Skepticism and silence are inexcusable. Working people in North Carolina and across our country deserve better. If you agree, chip in $5 to our campaign for the U.S. Senate so we can abolish the filibuster and deliver real results for our communities.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/2483?refcode=em20210610-159&t=22&akid=159%2E3698%2ElyfKn_)
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210610-159-footer&t=23&refcode2=159_3698_lyfKn_&akid=159%2E3698%2ElyfKn_)**

Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

subject: The Senate is a Disaster
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC
body:
Kick Them Out |
---
| | [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=b736ffb310&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| | Hi Peter,

My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots delivering accountability to Congress, [with your help](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=89c84d42e4&e=ba6e67b849)!

**While we all know about the Liz Cheneys and Adam Kinzingers of the Swamp, we can't forget the selfish traitors on the other side of Capitol Hill.... the Senate.**

While we are thrilled the Senate acquitted President Trump, there were still seven traitor Republicans who did the wrong thing. _These people have the nerve to ask for our money and support at election time, but lack the spine to do the right thing when push comes to shove._

_Seven Republicans joined Democrats in voting to convict Trump, but support from 67 senators — or two-thirds of the chamber — would have been required for a conviction.

The Republicans in favor of conviction were: Bill Cassidy of Louisiana, Richard Burr of North Carolina, Susan Collins of Maine, Lisa Murkowski of Alaska, Mitt Romney of Utah, Ben Sasse of Nebraska and Pat Toomey of Pennsylvania._

No Democrats would ever do the same. They stand by their leaders, but our worthless RINO elected officials care about themselves only. Craven cowards.

Now, we already knew Romney and Murkowski were awful. Murkowski has never even earned 50% of the vote in her elections, and even lost the nomination in 2010. Romney is.... Romney. He had to move to Utah to find an election he could actually win.

_The rest of them have no excuse._

Sasse? Toomey? Burr? Cassidy? What the heck?

The problem of the RINOs in the Swamp may go a lot further than any of us knew.

_The Swamp that Trump went to drain extends to the U.S. Senate. We need to take out the Swampers so the rest fall in line._
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=4e17948deb&e=ba6e67b849)
---
| **There is only one thing the RINOs understand: losing. We need to hold them accountable.**

We hear that the Swamp is going to go all out to save these traitors. Murkowski is up this year, most of the rest in 2024.

_The lot of them will be scared to death after we take some electoral scalps... and that's where we need your help._
---
| [ ](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=9a388235af&e=ba6e67b849)

| **We need Republicans who will fight Democrats, not join them. We need America First patriots, and we clearly don't have that now! [Help us show them the light!](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=46434ebd6f&e=ba6e67b849)**

Swampers live to lie. We must punish their lies! The Swamp never liked conservatives of principle. They distrust us, which is why they look down on us. Don't let them get away with it!

[Donate now.](https://draindcswamppac.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1a2dd064d65a7957a63c3a254&id=34077a3391&e=ba6e67b849)

Respectfully,

P.S. Much to my personal shame there were TWO TEXANS who voted wrong: Rep. VAN TAYLOR of TX-03 & Rep. Tony Gonzales of TX-23. There is no excuse for these two RINO SWAMP creatures to be returned to Congress. Help me return Taylor & Gonzales to private life in ‘22!

clean_body: Kick Them Out | | | | | Hi Peter, My name is Christopher Ekstrom, and I am the conservative businessman and donor with the DC Drain the Swamp PAC. We are America First patriots delivering accountability to Congress, ! While we all know about the Liz Cheneys and Adam Kinzingers of the Swamp, we can't forget the selfish traitors on the other side of Capitol Hill.... the Senate. While we are thrilled the Senate acquitted President Trump, there were still seven traitor Republicans who did the wrong thing. These people have the nerve to ask for our money and support at election time, but lack the spine to do the right thing when push comes to shove. Seven Republicans joined Democrats in voting to convict Trump, but support from 67 senators — or two-thirds of the chamber — would have been required for a conviction. The Republicans in favor of conviction were: Bill Cassidy of Louisiana, Richard Burr of North Carolina, Susan Collins of Maine, Lisa Murkowski of Alaska, Mitt Romney of Utah, Ben Sasse of Nebraska and Pat Toomey of Pennsylvania. No Democrats would ever do the same. They stand by their leaders, but our worthless RINO elected officials care about themselves only. Craven cowards. Now, we already knew Romney and Murkowski were awful. Murkowski has never even earned 50% of the vote in her elections, and even lost the nomination in 2010. Romney is.... Romney. He had to move to Utah to find an election he could actually win. The rest of them have no excuse. Sasse? Toomey? Burr? Cassidy? What the heck? The problem of the RINOs in the Swamp may go a lot further than any of us knew. The Swamp that Trump went to drain extends to the U.S. Senate. We need to take out the Swampers so the rest fall in line. | | There is only one thing the RINOs understand: losing. We need to hold them accountable. We hear that the Swamp is going to go all out to save these traitors. Murkowski is up this year, most of the rest in 2024. The lot of them will be scared to death after we take some electoral scalps... and that's where we need your help. | | We need Republicans who will fight Democrats, not join them. We need America First patriots, and we clearly don't have that now! Swampers live to lie. We must punish their lies! The Swamp never liked conservatives of principle. They distrust us, which is why they look down on us. Don't let them get away with it! Respectfully, | | Christopher Ekstrom Businessman America First Donor P.S. Much to my personal shame there were TWO TEXANS who voted wrong: Rep. VAN TAYLOR of TX-03 & Rep. Tony Gonzales of TX-23. There is no excuse for these two RINO SWAMP creatures to be returned to Congress. Help me return Taylor & Gonzales to private life in ‘22! P.P.S. We must defeat these RINOs! | "DONATE NOW!" | | | | Copyright © 2021 Drain the DC Swamp PAC, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is: Drain the DC Swamp PAC5 Halifax CtMarlton, NJ 08053-2820 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or . | PAID FOR BY DRAIN THE DC SWAMP PAC. name: Giffords.org
subject: One judge should not be able to undo decades of gun safety
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Friends -
Last week, an extremist federal judge prioritized weapons of war over the lives of Californians when he overturned California’s 32-year long assault weapons ban.
Assault weapons like AR-15 have been used in some of our nation’s deadliest mass shootings. An AR-15 was the weapon used in Parkland, Las Vegas, Sandy Hook, and so many more tragedies.
The truth of the matter is that one judge with extremist views shouldn’t be able to undo over 30 years of progress on commonsense gun safety.
We are outraged by this misguided decision that has been influenced by the NRA. We are mobilizing nationwide to fight back against this ruling, because if it can happen in California it can happen anywhere.
**We all need to stand up and fight back against this attack on our progress, which is why we have to ask:**
[**Will you make a $3 donation if you agree that one judge with extremist views shouldn’t be able to undo over 30 years of progress on commonsense gun safety? With your help we can fight back against this ruling and make our communities safer!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/giffords-em-jun21?amount=3?refcode=em210610-1-15&t=1&refcode2=215_3935704_y3clqL&akid=215%2E3935704%2Ey3clqL)

Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.
clean_body: Friends - Last week, an extremist federal judge prioritized weapons of war over the lives of Californians when he overturned California’s 32-year long assault weapons ban. Assault weapons like AR-15 have been used in some of our nation’s deadliest mass shootings. An AR-15 was the weapon used in Parkland, Las Vegas, Sandy Hook, and so many more tragedies. The truth of the matter is that one judge with extremist views shouldn’t be able to undo over 30 years of progress on commonsense gun safety. We are outraged by this misguided decision that has been influenced by the NRA. We are mobilizing nationwide to fight back against this ruling, because if it can happen in California it can happen anywhere. We all need to stand up and fight back against this attack on our progress, which is why we have to ask: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | ** | | | | | | | ** If one NRA-influenced judge in California can make this ruling, it could happen in any other state. So we need your help to mobilize nationwide and fight back. With your help, we will be able to keep our families and communities safer. Let’s work together to stop the NRA from reversing decades of gun safety progress. Our very best, Team Giffords Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

name: Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
subject: I fell short by just 6,588 votes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
They call me a self-hating Latino, just because I'm a female Republican. Well, I'm not self-hating, but I am a proud Latina Republican. I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b45474f39c284e26a5b9e8bc019d8740&_e=euOSW4_NcAQTd7K5nY4yk7hjnw170VHOFHV8pozI9wL1witgp3ydTHTC5zz3O-8I6kMubcmJxOuf4btMfWSLiD12N9PoN1FzYp6EbzW1z3io0RkcU3ekAAWIEgCHXzLv8JH9xzsj4fnVzNW-UsQV-4dcj00jy0qwUrK6y-x-_kFEZG1NTCf9HQb3gE3-CkZPrniqa1TU6Evy2Lbb35W6t_xxB7rQfncXkAZX76kw0tLTiXcZySNkno9s92GA_898OV9uhn0KuzlniHKQ9lMjaFFZwaXZC9trOtP0E31nj3jFIFApVfqss2umsxiZzc3NfDcUhRGZBImRL6B_X_12FiPEJle7tfTiOoyCoEuTlU8xktM9Tqjle_5L0AueXx0yFNr1uoBgzFCwigz_dMNZl2JIzW9aqlRQuXZHTfx0Sal8EF7eu3yt7AY0of7ZLlkdZSlQ27QGoBdL8C1qwzsPcMpg9M7fJvmCdO85YiuqJc0%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Latinos were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Latino,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, **a proud Latina Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b45474f39c284e26a5b9e8bc019d8740&_e=euOSW4_NcAQTd7K5nY4yk7hjnw170VHOFHV8pozI9wL1witgp3ydTHTC5zz3O-8I6kMubcmJxOuf4btMfWSLiD12N9PoN1FzYp6EbzW1z3io0RkcU3ekAAWIEgCHXzLv8JH9xzsj4fnVzNW-UsQV-4dcj00jy0qwUrK6y-x-_kFEZG1NTCf9HQb3gE3-CkZPrniqa1TU6Evy2Lbb35W6t_xxB7rQfncXkAZX76kw0tLTiXcZySNkno9s92GA_898OV9uhn0KuzlniHKQ9lMjaEWCh1xdea0a0U4MMsWKVIGeclywhy5lK4pj34NTj9zKqMAs3QMMLeJXqSTgzcef2rEhQgcX4IBWtVxwlaoXcPh1jgtaSSG0d4GMSOUdRYxtpbQG2h7fT2_ZJv-8NS8O61o40mz1B1tZWbJmBGLLckh5BAC7Se8XPSn9vJJN1YXMolj3t5mGl5-l1Ve75_shOHGD3adsQlz7uTo_XCsH7Ug%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS⇒ ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b45474f39c284e26a5b9e8bc019d8740&_e=euOSW4_NcAQTd7K5nY4yk7hjnw170VHOFHV8pozI9wL1witgp3ydTHTC5zz3O-8I6kMubcmJxOuf4btMfWSLiD12N9PoN1FzYp6EbzW1z3io0RkcU3ekAAWIEgCHXzLv8JH9xzsj4fnVzNW-UsQV-4dcj00jy0qwUrK6y-x-_kFEZG1NTCf9HQb3gE3-CkZPrniqa1TU6Evy2Lbb35W6t_xxB7rQfncXkAZX76kw0tLTiXcZySNkno9s92GA_898OV9uhn0KuzlniHKQ9lMjaAX-ySplPFvvVLCrVv70SbjSQ54Cc1FU_yhzW1dwDOGtUi4SLEw1ylTZ45eQ-hLD3bo8RRUFWkDmhRibM6IeWy6pJQC3te-H59b1BnqL-qQ6SCZAuVjqz_UTZiHPAbO7SaiHESCnn44c5GbwsgPVikYENqhuW-fPTfXx_Cda26XPGEuwZde5KSistHo_y1JWw0XWYgCGABeGar8PLLAwvlw%3D)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Latinos?**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b45474f39c284e26a5b9e8bc019d8740&_e=euOSW4_NcAQTd7K5nY4yk7hjnw170VHOFHV8pozI9wL1witgp3ydTHTC5zz3O-8I6kMubcmJxOuf4btMfWSLiD12N9PoN1FzYp6EbzW1z3io0RkcU3ekAAWIEgCHXzLv8JH9xzsj4fnVzNW-UsQV-4dcj00jy0qwUrK6y-x-_kFEZG1NTCf9HQb3gE3-CkZPrniqa1TU6Evy2Lbb35W6t_xxB7rQfncXkAZX76kw0tLTiXcZySNkno9s92GA_898OV9uhn0KuzlniHKQ9lMjaDnRCrnKo2SgtTXRRVeLa4FJcfiOrz7OnntL7irgqIsWPYLtsY5N8l9mbkt5lnY1HuuTOXyqMFgt3jWPc7ysK56IpmtN_Dn1g49LEL2aHveriqSRu5euAZjdzsDh7fDqBc2rk8HQLLQZH2sQZb9UMq3V8wNmV_V3CsLnUEmhtUJ88T9XbyQLSJxaY4TcPODwlLBuDIBpbWefWI0OxZdL1LM%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS ⇒ ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b45474f39c284e26a5b9e8bc019d8740&_e=euOSW4_NcAQTd7K5nY4yk7hjnw170VHOFHV8pozI9wL1witgp3ydTHTC5zz3O-8I6kMubcmJxOuf4btMfWSLiD12N9PoN1FzYp6EbzW1z3io0RkcU3ekAAWIEgCHXzLv8JH9xzsj4fnVzNW-UsQV-4dcj00jy0qwUrK6y-x-_kFEZG1NTCf9HQb3gE3-CkZPrniqa1TU6Evy2Lbb35W6t_xxB7rQfncXkAZX76kw0tLTiXcZySNkno9s92GA_898OV9uhn0KuzlniHKQ9lMjaMCgIo7NHf2aVwJcwgf4nkuS_NPdFvmERVjQeKn8IiaXszZN24nO9Q-2wXOyUL0JbrwewvLqPE8W1QbwJHfGLF44UFE7N8xEDAvlShV78CE5-bOK-YjCan-t7IEdnaOnmjHFjq-P81-Wj_-URBCvB9nNRWN93bycWppK6AYneyIHal2-W9BtVuqmMsoNy7f7wd86taI0qtWXXBwX6PIlbMo%3D)
Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b45474f39c284e26a5b9e8bc019d8740&_e=euOSW4_NcAQTd7K5nY4yk7hjnw170VHOFHV8pozI9wL1witgp3ydTHTC5zz3O-8I6kMubcmJxOuf4btMfWSLiD12N9PoN1FzYp6EbzW1z3io0RkcU3ekAAWIEgCHXzLv8JH9xzsj4fnVzNW-UsQV-4dcj00jy0qwUrK6y-x-_kFEZG1NTCf9HQb3gE3-CkZPrniqa1TU6Evy2Lbb35W6t_xxB7rQfncXkAZX76kw0tLTiXcZySNkno9s92GA_898OV9uhn0KuzlniHKQ9lMjaMXWNPIexKh-V8cgiFmonadmC3D6XMzNiJHDF70pPcJn3BQUdTOJaP2Jmz80gxz--4Muglf5ytlah3GMnah4eMDgj-hnObLhi28dYMsHNrsCoOJS_qJ1JWHAmJebrFKqCUoc0jOru5D3V2LcP0domMTcqW9Jox5-Uckc4WEEz5OajlHhaqppdm86NPphZ71pQM2kN2AhmDWWOOXdVkW7Zu0%3D)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
Republican for Congress

[ Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b45474f39c284e26a5b9e8bc019d8740&_e=euOSW4_NcAQTd7K5nY4yk7hjnw170VHOFHV8pozI9wL1witgp3ydTHTC5zz3O-8I6kMubcmJxOuf4btMfWSLiD12N9PoN1FzYp6EbzW1z3io0RkcU3ekAAWIEgCHXzLv8JH9xzsj4fnVzNW-UsQV-4dcj00jy0qwUrK6y-x-_kFEZG1NTCf9HQb3gE3-CkZPrniqa1TU6Evy2Lbb35W6t_xxB7rQfncXkAZX76kw0tLTiXcZySNkno9s92GA_898OV9uhn0KuzlniHKQ9lMjaJ4TBX0ityuF1rB3rofyMcRVTkPymKcEl6QHrLQ1nqXv3JhOsnFcVDDsZc_AiXKr0sxO61Osb82ojz6za53v5nkEEje9x6IOzddhruZ_r6hqwAPvAkk7bnsEYi6_b-1-fL5CSEBz4Bjp3n_WdUt3n4iANKyxiFfbS8v3uipRFNWx0ICGApLM-_alpizjWEE9u2wRPhs47Oq-i1cBGfEQ6cc%3D)

Friend,

Nancy Pelosi is TERRIFIED of a Red Wave in the midterms, and this proves it.

She recently sent out an email to Democrat Insiders admitting that their historically thin majority in Congress is at SERIOUS RISK because of the hard work of Republicans up and down the ballot.

If you don’t believe it, just take a look for yourself:

Peter,

If there’s one thing I can’t stand, it’s a liar. And you will never find a bigger liar than China.

For over a year, they have been trying to pull the wool over our eyes about the REAL origins of the coronavirus pandemic, trying to make us believe it came from a bad bat instead of being genetically engineered in a lab in Wuhan.

But the worst part is that Democrats believed every single word.

**Well Peter, I’m not about to allow the Left to give the Chinese Communist Party a free pass for cutting millions of lives short and then lying to cover it all up!**

New York City would be turned into a 24/7 movie set for “The Purge.” Her dangerous comments come at a time when shooting incidents are up 86 percent in May, and hate crimes are also skyrocketing. At a time when almost every category of major crime is up in our city and criminals are let back onto our streets after committing a crime, AOC should be ashamed! She has no regard for public safety, no respect for law enforcement, and is a complete hypocrite walking around with private security. I will always stand with law enforcement and for public safety...That is why AOC WANTS ME GONE. | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- Thank you, Rep. body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30588512/290007106/40582973?refcode=hla-em-210610-fd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMjRkNzI3Zi0yMmNhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0GWjsGKkXtq41pz-Q0MR25ajQvBcjDVpc_WikJpRrsw=&emci=9bd94779-22ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=124d727f-22ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18668076)

This Tuesday, we secured the Democratic nomination for Lt. Governor, Peter. We got one step closer to ending Virginia's 400-year history of never electing a woman to statewide office — and one step closer to ensuring working families like mine have a seat at the table, and a voice in the room. During my time in the Virginia House of Delegates, we expanded Medicaid to over 500,000 people, abolished the death penalty, legalized marijuana, and ratified the Equal Rights Amendment.
**Yes, we have made tremendous progress — but there is still so much work left to do. As your next Lt. Governor, I’m ready to hit the ground running.**
We must help folks through the public health and economic crisis by rebuilding our local economy stronger than before, creating jobs, and supporting our small businesses and workers. And we need to expand access to health care and lower prescription drug costs, too.
We need to invest in our infrastructure, like broadband, and bridge the digital divide facing our rural communities. We need to support and improve our school systems from Pre-K to post-secondary and give our students and teachers the tools they need to succeed.
And we need to continue reforming our criminal justice system for a more equitable Commonwealth so that every Virginian can feel safe in their community.
But far-right extremists like Winsome Sears will do anything to roll back our progress and block our work ahead. Now that we’ve won the Democratic nomination, the attacks will start tumbling in. That’s why we need to start building our winning campaign right now.
**Will you become a founding donor of our campaign right now? Anything you can spare will help us take on the GOP so we can protect and expand on our progress in the Commonwealth.**

name: Collier for Texas
subject: This just in, Dan Patrick is running again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Collier Committee
body:
|
#
---
This just in, team — **Dan Patrick officially announced his re-election bid for Lieutenant Governor of Texas.** After failing the people of Texas for years, Dan Patrick is now bragging about running the most conservative session in the Senate’s history. What he really means is that he passed the most restrictive anti-voter rights bills since Jim Crow, the worst bill for women’s health in a generation, a dangerous permitless carry bill, moved to deny unemployment benefits to struggling families, and failed to do anything to fix both our schools and our rickety power grid. Once again, he put culture wars ahead of the real issues facing Texas families. And during the next special session, he’s promised that it’s only going to get worse. Dan Patrick has harmed communities across our state and embarrassed us for too long. Heck, even his fellow Republican lawmakers say he needs to go. Texas families are counting on leadership that will lift every community and move our state forward, not backward. The future of our state is in the hands of Dan Patrick — unless we vote him out. That’s why we’re building a grassroots movement of folks from every county of Texas who are ready for change. We’re relying on a wave of grassroots supporters to fuel our campaign, and help us take on Patrick’s army of corporate lobbyists and right-wing megadonors. That’s where you come in: **We cannot let Dan Patrick have the gavel for another term. clean_body: | This just in, team — Dan Patrick officially announced his re-election bid for Lieutenant Governor of Texas. After failing the people of Texas for years, Dan Patrick is now bragging about running the most conservative session in the Senate’s history. What he really means is that he passed the most restrictive anti-voter rights bills since Jim Crow, the worst bill for women’s health in a generation, a dangerous permitless carry bill, moved to deny unemployment benefits to struggling families, and failed to do anything to fix both our schools and our rickety power grid. Once again, he put culture wars ahead of the real issues facing Texas families. And during the next special session, he’s promised that it’s only going to get worse. Dan Patrick has harmed communities across our state and embarrassed us for too long. Heck, even his fellow Republican lawmakers say he needs to go. Texas families are counting on leadership that will lift every community and move our state forward, not backward. The future of our state is in the hands of Dan Patrick — unless we vote him out. That’s why we’re building a grassroots movement of folks from every county of Texas who are ready for change. We’re relying on a wave of grassroots supporters to fuel our campaign, and help us take on Patrick’s army of corporate lobbyists and right-wing megadonors. That’s where you come in: We cannot let Dan Patrick have the gavel for another term. Pitch in $5 or any amount right now to help us defeat him and flip Texas blue in 2022: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = If Mike runs, he vows to fight against the hateful, anti-democratic agenda Dan Patrick promotes at every turn. Together, we can work to find solutions to our state’s biggest problems by investing in health care, good-paying jobs, infrastructure, and education. Texans cannot afford to suffer under the leadership of someone like Dan Patrick again. Thanks for standing up for our Texas values. Collier for Texas The Collier Committee P.O. Box 14648 Humble, TX 77347 United States | | Paid for by the Collier Committee

subject: SHOCKING: Liberal media 'disturbed' by AMERICAN FLAG
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elise for Congress
body:
Help me send a message to the liberal media.

[](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9960620/224717773/202621/1/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=ae965805) **
New York Times Editorial Board Member 'Disturbed' by Sight of American Flags**
Yes, you read that right, Friend.

A liberal New York Times editorial board member is 'disturbed' by patriotic Americans proudly flying our nation's flag.

The failing New York Times might be ashamed of our flag, but I am proud of it.

And I know that Patriots like YOU are proud of our flag, too. [**Will you help me send a message to the New York Times and show them that Americans are PROUD of our flag?**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9960620/224717773/202621/2/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=853ec0e1) _****_ | [STAND UP FOR OUR FLAG](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9960620/224717773/202621/3/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=df5fcc13)

The Far Left and the Lamestream Media have decided that our flag is something to be ashamed of instead of celebrated.

[**Proud Americans like us can prove them wrong.**](http://ct4.americasnewsletter.com/t/9960620/224717773/202621/4/?ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&ba8ec202=cnAuMTAxNDk5&x=f2e0f99a)

name: Stewart Navarre
subject: I am disappointed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS
body:
Peter,

The event on the 6th of January was an embarrassment for our country, and especially for me as a Marine who has served abroad to defend our nation and our democracy.

I, like many of you, was extremely disappointed in the failure of Congress to support a bipartisan investigation into what happened in our nation’s Capitol.

There are too many unanswered questions about what happened, why it happened, and who was involved.

We deserve to know the truth. Unhealthy partisanship is getting in the way. And that is exactly why I am running.

I will be part of turning things around as your Congressman. Will you chip in $15 today to help me get there? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn?refcode=2106010-email]

Our country is in desperate need of a new generation of service-driven leaders. But I cannot do it alone. If you are able, please donate whatever you can to our campaign through this link: secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2106-q2-sn?refcode=2106010-email]

Thank you for your time and support,
Stewart

PAID FOR BY STEWART NAVARRE FOR CONGRESS

Stewart Navarre for Congress
PO Box 150
Fredericksburg, VA 22404
United States

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: Here’s the deal...
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
We were just named one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022 and we need your help to defend this Arizona seat. Can you give us a minute to lay out the details?
We made history in Arizona when we won in 2020, but now Mark needs your help to hold this seat and fend off attacks from National Republicans.
This is even more critical now that we’ve been named one of the Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022 and since a Mitch McConnell-backed Super PAC bought a **_six-figure ad buy_** in Arizona attacking our campaign.
We need to keep up the pace in order to hit our 100,000 contribution June fundraising goal and we haven’t brought in as many contributions as we’d hoped today. So here’s the deal:
We need you to become a new supporter to help us get one step closer to hitting our goal.
Normally most first time contributors chip in $5. If you would consider contributing $10 we’ll be where we need to be to hit our goal so we can keep Mark in the Senate.
[**So what do you say? Can you make a $10 donation towards our June fundraising deadline? We need your help to hit our 100,000 contribution goal so we can generate the resources to hold this seat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210610-1-15&t=1&refcode2=760_6688874_oHgcbD&akid=760%2E6688874%2EoHgcbD)
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210610-1-15&t=2&refcode2=760_6688874_oHgcbD&akid=760%2E6688874%2EoHgcbD)**
With everyone pitching in just a little more, we’ll hit our goal and be ready for anything that happens, as we work day in and day out to hold this seat and fight for progress that will improve people’s lives.
So thank you in advance for chipping in!
All our best,
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-june21?refcode=em210610-1-15&t=3&refcode2=760_6688874_oHgcbD&akid=760%2E6688874%2EoHgcbD)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=760%2E6688874%2EoHgcbD).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

Team -

This has been a very active week for me as I make my way around the district. But the first thing I want to talk about is Memorial Day.

Memorial Day is day of commemoration to the men and women who sacrificed their lives for our country. It is a solemn day of remembrance and I spent it visiting with legions and in cemetery services honoring our heroes. I also think it is great that many spend the day with family and friends celebrating the start of summer because our heroes died so that we COULD celebrate in freedom.

In the past 244+ years, more than 2.5 million men and women have given their lives for my freedom. Countless others came home broken in mind, body, and spirit and still countless more signed up to put their lives on the line so that I might be free. Yes, it is that personal. I have been blessed to have been able to live the American Dream and it is only because they fought for me. That is why I am donating 100% of my congressional salary to charities that benefit veterans living in our district.

May God bless all who stand up for our freedom. May God protect the souls of all who have made the ultimate sacrifice for our United States of America.

|
---
**Susan Wild Update**

_Did you know that Susan Wild is a Co-Sponsor of the disastorous H.R.1?_

If you don't know much about this bill, that is because Progressives like Susan Wild don't want you to become aware of what they plan to do to our elections. H.R. 1 is nothing more than a Democrat attempt to hijack our election process, full of provisions that would weaken our system. It calls for consolidating control of elections at the federal level, stripping states of the right to administer their own elections (which is Unconstitutional).

The fact that the main proponent of Wild's bill that was passed by the House and awaits action in the Senate is to Federalize our elections is bad enough. Still, there is a laundry list of extreme positions, like allowing ballot harvesting, counting illegal immigrants as U.S. residents, using **your** taxpayer dollars to fund politicians, and destroying Voter I.D. laws and future attempts at creating Voter I.D. laws.

If you think that all of these provisions have the effect of tipping the balance of our election systems, it is because they do!

The goal of this bill is to make sure that we can never have Voter ID, federalize voting by mail, and give Democrat politicians up to seven million dollars of **your** taxpayer funds to pay for their campaigns. Democrats want to use their slim majority right now and pass HR 1 to ensure that they stay in power for generations.

|
---

**Update from the District!**

On June 2 I had the incredibly humbling honor of being named the Distinguished Citizen Honoree at the Service to Youth and Community Breakfast at the Hawk Mountain Scout Reservation in Schuylkill Haven. I have been blessed in my life and see that as both an obligation and privilege to give back and leave the world just a little better.

_**Check out the pictures below from all my stops throughout the disctrict, including the opening of Carera Organix in Nazareth, Monroe County GOP West End meeting, and other events!**_

Be sure to keep an eye out for future updates form the campaign and future events!

Onward to victory,

Lisa Scheller
Candidate for Congress

subject: FW: Is America A Racist Country? (No.)
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
Have you had a chance to respond yet to my team’s last email to you? I want to know what you think about critical race theory, the Far Left’s new cur Friend, Have you had a chance to respond yet to my team’s last email to you? I want to know what you think about critical race theory, the Far Left’s new curriculum that says America is and always will be a racist country. **[Do you think that our kids should be taught critical race theory in school? ](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=5728e4ee0ee141d89d423a62945abd0e&_e=Yjp0UdkZO411kSab0Av7LaGomHOAd_aAGRtucooQRoYcs-roKQkkZk-0xCey1da4AlXdcnZVQLhE4PznXhThruP1_pxPilsJHqasLJ1nO87BoxNeS2tNdyBMKCbNSIR4HuzW1WoOi0Tz7N68fxsMmxBJZMoyU9hlmglsZmLQVUrAQj6VO7oX4ZTYq63sF_68kRZtP4hCH4wCG3oNr-S0dH2Cw5FByc3hYyUHNGJq2DIEWwUyQ3zFiRKVQJ_w2Yk2mtRTgJOWp3BX_2O_HzjtF6GITI6TOvg0_hJUoBc32SbQO5LB845cZ9yq3BdX_26LtwwOXxCo2hub-9HoDcIf7t7cau_MtvB1C8YPT_cNDVfnY51CSYy2IfVjPbTUZh8ezK9cn7l6oXHQUQBowIMukzdYJPA8iAqnaaeegLhMXLyD_LtKjIIBlD2Pfsj2vqyd)** [**YES**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=5728e4ee0ee141d89d423a62945abd0e&_e=Yjp0UdkZO411kSab0Av7LaGomHOAd_aAGRtucooQRoYcs-roKQkkZk-0xCey1da4AlXdcnZVQLhE4PznXhThruP1_pxPilsJHqasLJ1nO87BoxNeS2tNdyBMKCbNSIR4HuzW1WoOi0Tz7N68fxsMmxBJZMoyU9hlmglsZmLQVUrAQj6VO7oX4ZTYq63sF_68kRZtP4hCH4wCG3oNr-S0dMzHfcHCrBUxQ3Dg8qDnU157hXYYBn3HhmkIk8X1Br0CUoSwHEmS4J5qNlQENBIvxC76sd0ICTbN2S_HEFLJkWcaaLZa83GUYE9nqbSMNB2WhNGOm9NjTSa7KmbcVtyLQT4Eqf0tBI9UWO2EoNOU6GxX6D8uFPwmL94zoIXq4FUBK-UXHsvwLY_tC6ieENs5MktSmjv088qknlsxXMo7Hp5s42ewfXjGS6id0nyeCe1j) [**NO**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=5728e4ee0ee141d89d423a62945abd0e&_e=Yjp0UdkZO411kSab0Av7LaGomHOAd_aAGRtucooQRoYcs-roKQkkZk-0xCey1da4AlXdcnZVQLhE4PznXhThruP1_pxPilsJHqasLJ1nO87BoxNeS2tNdyBMKCbNSIR4HuzW1WoOi0Tz7N68fxsMmxBJZMoyU9hlmglsZmLQVUrAQj6VO7oX4ZTYq63sF_68kRZtP4hCH4wCG3oNr-S0dHF6J9_NnKvKsqsUK4NqGLHzjxZ-b-qHWxoRScmeARhC6FfNOYYkr2wXqm28RwjNWTp-EtzI03sIIfXOPvSUM_A-_xRcT0jeTwrQGmgfSXAX90wsHrERCt9dlCqJ2Zciq8LFwFou6PZV_eoX9I9_dw0njkz6RRGuh3N_BiW8E8wGwWeO8qTRknpU71ANo2-SX9UlJldz4OdqHfYkWM0zSZFBZgpglKzzF_LagZN0i_gN) Critical race theory seeks to divide our students. Fellow Conservative,

I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when I decided to take a vacation with my two childhood friends in Europe during 2015. **We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over our train and kill us all.**

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat - as an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why along with my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop the terrorist that day.

Last year I ran for Congress because, like a lot of you reading this email, my congressman lost touch with reality long ago. **My life changed the day my friends and I took on Islamic terrorism** , and since then I've made a habit of standing up and speaking out when I know there is a need.

Recently, I launched my second campaign for Congress and **[I am asking for your help to fill our campaign accounts which we were forced to empty entirely last fall](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5220656026594d86ace61b47f7d7b7c1&_e=l9pm50rsUqkRDYvwjOJMKmNoXv7oY7eud0dozHQuuTEeFJaqF5ZnAanYyRHlPn2yS3j-MsUNkmCB-Tczph8-w6usDXd8480yp853omBWGpNIkKOJJpzSvyQxC8K9Y-wknxGp_7BvYxt4x96TY_FbzuoRIqymu0aWEKfgmgWTz5TJ2lhJ5uFBRTlQjbFj7rz7AzuUXeO2ELH0SOGuEOABQIZ05x4CIOGE1DtnLWuUU3H-a0sh2et8wICXR3iK7wVWpElDDIcuHj006aQzFUWoBxbmcV589O5kEalh6tkSELeguu0BrkfxC2QsAPMdZg7tC4B3B8CSJgDZ22WVpKVWtW7mbFSWA7mbiVrVsLW91oPeo-yvm8D230uxC0Oj4Grhkn1ER00ncpWWvW-lc-U3fQqit2ep0eTm1e67T5YB_PTGd6ay9b1d27g4_uBPd1EAB4dV6PriW3JsENn4_HgS-w%3D%3D)**.

Republicans are on the cusp of flipping the House - we only need a net gain of FIVE seats - **[simply put, there is no way I can't sit on the sidelines and not do my part, so I'm challenging Peter DeFazio once again.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=5220656026594d86ace61b47f7d7b7c1&_e=l9pm50rsUqkRDYvwjOJMKmNoXv7oY7eud0dozHQuuTEeFJaqF5ZnAanYyRHlPn2yS3j-MsUNkmCB-Tczph8-w6usDXd8480yp853omBWGpNIkKOJJpzSvyQxC8K9Y-wknxGp_7BvYxt4x96TY_FbzuoRIqymu0aWEKfgmgWTz5TJ2lhJ5uFBRTlQjbFj7rz7AzuUXeO2ELH0SOGuEOABQIZ05x4CIOGE1DtnLWuUU3H-a0sh2et8wICXR3iK7wVWILQa9yige67sd2En5isToJh4vULC3vIX9kldpRJ2TEKNhRl2MuQXANJtysrqlfxJ8VCUqaMDGc193WZp4-vRTKw2ERKnz3qu42oMvsJ1bJ1nz1WaNgekRWJEm5TFT4SCQER3gjTxMDP2zRZ5RnfQQzxT-lDcig0CKPhxcmLiS9NFtt6S3J66cNEjNsydanuRI7A7IDl7SbOasbXm3RYDBA%3D%3D)**

Following the events of that day on the Paris-bound train, the President awarded me the United States Army's Soldier's Medal, and the events of that fateful day were later retold in the film _The 15:17 to Paris,_ **directed by Clint Eastwood.**

Fellow American,

On President Biden’s first day in office, he revoked a permit for the Keystone XL Pipeline. _KILLING_ thousands of good-paying jobs.

**_The irony?_**

He’s now allowing Russia’s President Putin to move forward with the completion of the Nord Stream 2 pipeline by waiving sanctions Congress sought to impose on Putin and his corrupt cronies.

[**Stop Biden’s pipeline to Putin ⇒**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=c1a592c697414adf8818526a977a15a2&_e=Mr0X7iW3bDrTPC2v7PrPy-5hgKaLxVITRdVNbodnB6_r-NfX703VpWkZX_zoTWj8kvatRiaYAGstwID-kIT4TpCe8owK6woVDlROYTjYYsqc9zYLn96au-2i0FfA5X0r1clpf6Ya98R7zMszFubfaGv-XNqKpunHLzCIlRMfm1xzQ4WmlSsilTHjObeuNkXVkv4TNTOpwbn4px-HJwlae9GRRhaSDGT33fZ00LTAHhtnROdaVzSGDo1LW1JSTONJgebEzvw6nFAtLoe9UDU4Bj4EjN0rauOmEmKR3ECsHUJ8cQGg42SYawvZgjmraGwITDCCYawnizdkfv39Ao82z-mqjPwIx0Od6Y4U0iJ6mPi8leqGe0Vg49vAFKxQIh8NWNtzFf3RotMBaLCK2AvMjLmofMaPIsh9V3PWNWQduFLB9HVAEc9weHu8jjnBeKCCV-K2oh953WoHAT4mG8KDMvD7qS4BygXLPjoXnjOi12naHs70H9K9f73B3dIdU_DPdd6bAESuFMMU7fNp3qjEI8h9DIv8ZdjOZi4vuoWckNo%3D)
This fossil fuel infrastructure project will solidify Russia’s natural gas monopoly and pave the way for Moscow to increase its power and influence over our allies.

**_Biden’s decision-making is a threat to America’s national security._**

Fellow American, if the president is unwilling to put America First, Congress needs to intervene. His decision-making is a threat to America’s national security. | Fellow American, On President Biden’s first day in office, he revoked a permit for the Keystone XL Pipeline. KILLING thousands of good-paying jobs. The irony? He’s now allowing Russia’s President Putin to move forward with the completion of the Nord Stream 2 pipeline by waiving sanctions Congress sought to impose on Putin and his corrupt cronies.
