name: Defend NH Police
subject: Defend our brave men and women in uniform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
They put their lives on the line for us, it's time that we show our support for them
Derek,

Our Federal delegation is out-of-touch, and refuses to put our brave men and women in uniform before their own agenda. Time and time again, they have caved to the will of the radical left, and they will do so again.
Democrats like AOC have routinely called for the defunding of police. We must fight back, and show our support for those who defend us each and every day.
[](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdefend-nh-police/1/01000179f701a1ba-532c66f3-e723-44b1-abf7-919eeefbeb25-000000/8AwILFPW8LuxiYOl809yLi8xCeE=218)
Call on our federal delegation to reject radical leftism, and support the efforts of Granite State police.
Sign our petition to show your support for our men and women in uniform.
They put their lives on the line every day for us, it's time that we take a stand, and fight for them.

[Sign the petition to defend our brave New Hampshire police officers](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fnew-hampshire-gop%2Fdefend-nh-police/2/01000179f701a1ba-532c66f3-e723-44b1-abf7-919eeefbeb25-000000/2NdL8c51PlizQmI1uPfhsNNsRXU=218)

name: Delina DiSanto
subject: I believe in asking for help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Delina DiSanto for Congress
body:
When I defeat Gosar, Arizonans will finally have a representative who listens to their needs and fights for real progress.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30594622/290030345/-1338678480?refcode=BLU-DDC-20210610-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZDVmZWFlYy0zNmNhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nR0e2rMBUAI4kWxVj0ro9RGpxYICf0IkilvEBsSN3gE=)
---
|

**I’m nothing like Paul Gosar — and I’m proud of it.** I’m a mom, a registered nurse, and a small business owner. I believe in telling the truth, rejecting the broken politics that got us here, and I also believe in **asking for help.**

subject: ICYMI: New Polling Shows Beastly Momentum for John Cox
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Cox for Governor 2021, Inc
body:
Cox has emerged as the clear leader in the bid to replace Newsom | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/votejohncox/icymi-new-polling-shows-beastly-momentum-for-john-cox?e=b8a6795190)
---
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f6aa6b8a41&e=b8a6795190)
| | | | | | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
June 10, 2021

---
| **CONTACT**
Anthony Ramirez
[anthony@votejohncox.com](mailto:anthony@votejohncox.com)
---
### New Polling Shows Beastly Momentum for John Cox
_Cox has emerged as the clear leader in the bid to replace Newsom_
SAN DIEGO, CALIFORNIA—The John Cox for Governor campaign today released new polling on the state of the recall against Gavin Newsom. The survey was conducted by Erik Iverson of Moore Information Group. Moore Information is one of the nation’s leading polling firms and has done extensive research work in California and across the country.The two key takeaways from the poll are that intensity is on the side of recall supporters and that if Newsom is recalled, Cox is the clear front-runner to replace him.Among the likeliest voters, 49 percent of voters would vote YES, to recall Newsom while 46 percent would vote NO.When it comes to who will replace Newsom, Cox is leading two different scenarios. In a mixed field with Democrats and Republicans, Cox leads by ten amongst the likeliest voters compared to the next closest candidate.In a field of only Republicans, Cox has double the support of Kevin Faulconer.The full memo can be read here ([link](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=0aa4c22bf9&e=b8a6795190)).
# # #
**About Moore Information Group** Moore Information Group knows how to accurately poll – and win – tough races. In 2020 alone, MIG was 6 for 6 in U.S. Senate races, including three of the highest profile and most expensive campaigns: Susan Collins (R-ME), Steve Daines (R-MT) and Tommy Tuberville in Alabama. Both Senators Daines and Collins had to fight two-front wars – one, their actual campaigns and two, the public polling false narratives that showed them either trailing or labeled “toss up” races by DC media insiders. Senators Daines and Collins are long-time clients, so when MIGs numbers looked different than the public polls, they knew who to trust. MIG got it right where almost all others were wrong. And when several outside polls showed Tommy Tuberville’s race with Jeff Sessions to be too close to call, MIG accurately predicted Coach’s 20-point win over Sessions.We also polled for Senators Cynthia Lummis (R-WY), Dan Sullivan (R-AK) and Jim Risch (R- ID). Combined, in 2020 alone, MIG helped elect or reelect 14 members of the U.S. House of Representatives, 6 U.S. Senators, 1 Governor and numerous state legislators in multiple states.With over 40 years in the business, MIG has polled for more than 50 U.S. Senate campaigns, over 280 Congressional campaigns, over 35 Gubernatorial campaigns (including the 2003 recall election of Gray Davis in CA) and over 50 statewide initiatives. And in California alone, Moore Information Group has polled for 15 statewide campaigns, 28 congressional campaigns and 10 ballot measure campaigns and over 50 State Senate and Assembly races. MIG has also conducted in-depth surveys among Hispanic voters in California as well as undertaking opinion research efforts for corporations, municipalities, trade associations and Independent Expenditure committees. There is no part of the state that we haven’t polled. Simply put, MIG knows California and its voters.
|
---
TV Stations interested in talking to John Cox via Zoom can reach out to the campaign by contacting Press Secretary Anthony Ramirez at [anthony@votejohncox.com](mailto:anthony@votejohncox.com).
| | | **ABOUT** John Cox is a political outsider who’ll shake up Sacramento and cut taxes. California is spiraling downward as it’s been failed by career politicians and insiders who look out for their own interests, and not those of the average Californian. John’s an outsider, who doesn’t owe the establishment anything. He understands what it’s like to scratch and claw to survive and succeed.

For more information please visit, [**johncox.com**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=e3b61c010a&e=b8a6795190)**** and follow @BeastJohnCox on social media.
---

body:
I wanted to take a moment to celebrate the LGBTQ+ community’s fight for equality.
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30595326/290032955/2031134326?refcode=em_fr_2021.06.10_b1_toh_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGJiYWEwYS0zOGNhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ESSu6oqwkKLWXL_Jzw6QccpEyEuBhxwLSHkVUrOTEZA=)**
Friend,

June is Pride Month, and I wanted to take a moment to celebrate the LGBTQ+ community’s fight for equality.

This Pride Month, I am so proud of the contributions put forth by the LGBTQ+ community as they continue to fight for justice. These contributions have benefitted not just the LGBTQ+ community, but have made all of us better as we strive towards fairness.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30595327/290032956/-1425992037?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2OGJiYWEwYS0zOGNhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ESSu6oqwkKLWXL_Jzw6QccpEyEuBhxwLSHkVUrOTEZA=&emci=568e16ad-66c9-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=68bbaa0a-38ca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=18634996)
I’m going to keep fighting for LGBTQ+ rights in Congress, because it’s the right thing to do. I hope you’ll join me in saying: love is love.

I hope that this month, we can reflect on our responsibility to protect freedom and equality for all Arizonans and celebrate the strength of our diversity. We are stronger because of the progress we’ve made, and I’m proud to stand with the LGBTQ+ community.

Happy Pride!

\-- Tom

---
****_Tom O'Halleran has a proven track record of working across the aisle to get things done. He believes Congress has a responsibility to put aside partisan politics and work together to solve the problems affecting America and Arizona. With your help, we can find solutions to the problems that Arizonans and Americans face today._**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: The Truth about the GOP . . .
body:
Last year I played nice as a Republican candidate.
| | | [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/hcisrdVLQL0Ca3lhMKRRAw/n6fQD2fugijOCz8e3VunPg)
Patriot,

[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/hcisrdVLQL0Ca3lhMKRRAw/n6fQD2fugijOCz8e3VunPg) Last year I played nice as a Republican candidate.

I shook all the hands, kissed the babies, didn't do anything "crazy," and was the good girl that my campaign team was told the RNC wanted to see.

And despite crushing the competition and becoming the Republican Congressional Nominee for Florida's 21st Congressional District, where I received President Trump's endorsement and vote, I received ZERO support from the RNC and NRCC.

This year, I won't hold back. **Laura is going to be Laura.**

If you want to back a Republican candidate for Congress who won't hold back and will tell the truth about the declining state of our nation and our party, [**then please stand with me**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/hcisrdVLQL0Ca3lhMKRRAw/n6fQD2fugijOCz8e3VunPg).

**If you want to expose the crooks and grifters REGARDLESS of party affiliation . . .[send me in](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/hcisrdVLQL0Ca3lhMKRRAw/n6fQD2fugijOCz8e3VunPg).**

If you want someone who plays nice with the establishment and won't rock the boat, there are up to 434 other candidates to back.
**There 's a reason why Obamacare is still on the books.

There's a reason why Cancel Culture is gaining steam and the Big Tech Tyrants are STILL not being held accountable.**
Every issue the GOP has been "fighting" for decades is still an issue because Republican leaders will talk up a storm on Twitter, but when it comes to taking action, **they don 't want their sugar daddies to cut them off**.

With regards to Obamacare, the Health Care Industry donated $225 million to federal candidates last year.

The Insurance Industry donated $120 million.

The hedge funds invested in those companies donated another $240 million. And don't even get me started on the hundreds of millions of dollars Big Tech gave to candidates this last election cycle.

**The top 10 industries in the United States donated $5.4 BILLION to candidates and parties last cycle - and that doesn't even include "dark money."**

Individual donors are literally drown out by the mountains of cash rolling into the campaign accounts of incumbents from various industries and special interests.

So what do both Republican and Democrat leaders do? They listen to the industries and do their bidding.

They're puppets who perform for the cameras and then sit in their boxes and don't do anything when the lights aren't shining on them.

Naturally, they don't want people like me in Congress who will expose this scam and call them out.

**And I absolutely will expose all of them . . . bet on it.**

We have the ability to completely change the political landscape . . . [**if you can help me get inside the halls of Congress**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/hcisrdVLQL0Ca3lhMKRRAw/n6fQD2fugijOCz8e3VunPg).

Once I'm in, there will be more to follow as **I 'll open the floodgates from within**.

It's up to all of us to save America together.

I'm running to win in 2022, and [**I want you by my side to victory**](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/hcisrdVLQL0Ca3lhMKRRAw/n6fQD2fugijOCz8e3VunPg).

With Respect,

Laura Loomer

Paid for by Laura Loomer for Congress Inc Contributions to Laura Loomer for Congress Inc are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, federal contractors, and foreign nationals are prohibited.

---
Laura Loomer for Congress Inc
720 Lucerne Ave, #1465
LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460
[Unsubscribe](https://deploy.libersend.com/unsubscribe/wJCYyn7638HXOcoR8928MiNxO5nXTgGo6s7D8pT0763BW8929so/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/n6fQD2fugijOCz8e3VunPg)
[Web Version](https://deploy.libersend.com/w/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/0zt892892sGgF1vXY892mEa9qbyQ/n6fQD2fugijOCz8e3VunPg)

name: Richard
subject: Do you want Trump on Facebook again?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=ngb9bd%2BjlxMuK4PqHuIE3VfpxkiEM9sB&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
Facebook just suspended Donald Trump from using its platform until 2023 - which means he won't be able to spread inflammatory lies, lash out at his opponents, or incite violence on the platform for the next year and a half.
This is a step forward, but it's not enough. Beginning November 3, 2020, Trump has continued daily endangering the cornerstone of our democracy by spreading his Big Lie about the election through every means available to him. Most especially on January 6, 2021, one of the darkest days in American history, when he inspired a violent mob of his supporters to storm the Capitol.
Since his social media accounts were temporarily suspended, Donald Trump has continued to spread lies - lies that, if amplified on social media, could pose serious harm to our democratic institutions. Now, Trump wants his Facebook account back to speak directly to the 81% of American adults who have an account.
**As Mark Zuckerberg considers whether to let Trump back on his platform, I 'm counting on people like you to share where you stand. We need 1,000 people to answer this one-question poll before midnight tonight, so I'm hoping to get your response right now:**
**Should Facebook allow Donald Trump back on its platform?**
| | | [Yes](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trumpsmban?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1033-su-nd) | [No](https://surveys.signforgood.com/blumenthal-trumpsmban?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1033-su-nd)
---|---
Thank you,
Dick

Terry’s opponent says he’s proud to have Donald Trump’s endorsement. He even added “Donald Trump represents so much of why I’m running.”

And he’s putting his money where his mouth is. He has supported Donald Trump’s anti-democratic conspiracy theories and pushed an agenda of restricting voter access.

On the other hand, Terry is a champion for our freedom to vote. As Governor, he restored voting rights to more people than any other Governor in history. He fought hard to make sure Virginia was one of the most welcoming, inclusive and forward-looking places in the country. But if Terry’s opponent wins, he’ll take the Commonwealth backwards.

**In state after state across the country, we have seen that governors play a large role in determining whether access is restricted or expanded. We must hold the line in Virginia to protect and expand progress.**

So here is the deal: if we do our part to elect Terry in Virginia, we can send a message to the entire country that our Democracy is stronger than ever. We can demonstrate that candidates who support voter suppression and Donald Trump’s big lie will be met with a groundswell of grassroots resistance.

**[Please, donate to Terry’s campaign right now and become a part of his historic movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/30595599/290033953/-2023814932?refcode=20210610_SA_6AT_B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOWE2OWZjYi0zOGNhLWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Td7NvgynfsMi_8N5lZQMPHpqdslC8AniCyesTc2KTRE=)**

I’m counting on you, Derek.

Stacey Abrams

name: Heidi St. John
subject: A New Kind of "Squad"
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| With the election of "The Squad" America entered a new era in politics. Four freshmen Congresswomen have changed the course of a nation. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez of New York, Ilhan Omar of Minnesota, Ayanna Pressley of Massachusetts, and Rashida Tlaib of Michigan have drug the Democratic party to the far edge of progressivism... and in doing so they have drug the United States with them. YOU are a part of the solution to that problem.
The traditional importance of US Congressional candidates was limited to their home district. What sort of "pork" could they bring home to their district? New highway construction? New government contracts? New tax breaks? Pork Barrel Politics has been an American tradition since before the Civil War. But all that has changed.
The Squad has taught us all that the right voices can move the nation left... or right. Those voices can move America toward Godliness... or away from it; toward righteousness or toward lawlessness. Heidi St. John is such a voice. Whether you live in the 3rd Congressional District of Washington, a Houston suburb, or upstate New York... Heidi is a voice for YOU.
If you know Heidi, you know she has the courage, stamina. intellect, and speaking gift to change laws, to change hearts, and to change a nation. Heidi needs your prayers, your financial support, and your encouragement. Heidi St. John can be the "AOC" of righteousness in Congress. Now is not the time to shrink back in fear. Now is the time to press in with courage.

body:
I nearly became the first Latina Republican elected to Congress from South Texas. I fell short by just 6,588 votes I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c8d867fe409b4615a9ab24c8d2c384b5&_e=S-w_jlWyE1BmDgi3Hro4O26Jg8piLM6rbX2VymHOJU3KtrXbjaFCTcI3EeKTIeHIZ74CuW0OPAk6UfxMdNtxWQAI4PfYj06CrT3gLrkql6HDicBfXMKS1k96B6r4Ink0jNAomZtQdMYgjRnEpPTOb2RUwbMZ-vK5Lb0RZlAZCMRsuXmQbNCQ53sW40FpMeQJB4TvdgZY3G1Hnp4Jqzli_TTNvuPbv8hHc_aU9-1STe0VHLZ4xiG1jECyxvAwiLftrKwUYjkfhAXbGdNsCAWDASZnnxgm5xKsO94M2SNa0iBoX0z_e7TCcWwEh6Ju97Q2uZled8itU9Y0bnAkNRTQ2Sm3ZsY5NleICIGp2_SUPAZnNgE9I5AfIH3JMkk97ykdb9_FDBFphizX9fp-60-HaiTy2TjqJLUfGyyicANrFhjgcP4l9TkLdzxv9YIu8iWJyw9yyVwUJPMsyAzlGQ8u93LP9MloNMrTWgeZdytqRG9f427obYSv0Eege5EVH4Aj)
---
Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Latinos were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Latino,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, **a proud Latina Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c8d867fe409b4615a9ab24c8d2c384b5&_e=S-w_jlWyE1BmDgi3Hro4O26Jg8piLM6rbX2VymHOJU3KtrXbjaFCTcI3EeKTIeHIZ74CuW0OPAk6UfxMdNtxWQAI4PfYj06CrT3gLrkql6HDicBfXMKS1k96B6r4Ink0jNAomZtQdMYgjRnEpPTOb2RUwbMZ-vK5Lb0RZlAZCMRsuXmQbNCQ53sW40FpMeQJB4TvdgZY3G1Hnp4Jqzli_TTNvuPbv8hHc_aU9-1STe0VHLZ4xiG1jECyxvAwiLftrKwUYjkfhAXbGdNsCAWDAZ6vpWOUxiVUXXjLTIwRceck990ngBbVFXBWok6XzA5L-ugd3hHqM0zNQrml4mL_cAkCDMRJ60F_n1uysTdbRvFsQ64Cn482PumFDwjuW4LVQYcEbfPqViDrbnEhEJEUFAUvT6zX6DiQrKVjLJd_oP-_p8ob_I3mPnSod2nq-KBHQUsMX7ItPBQi_EMVlJqgUsusSilsh2srZQgQ3Yy7LhE9hEiqqxhF3lfxL22u7TW3)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS⇒ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c8d867fe409b4615a9ab24c8d2c384b5&_e=S-w_jlWyE1BmDgi3Hro4O26Jg8piLM6rbX2VymHOJU3KtrXbjaFCTcI3EeKTIeHIZ74CuW0OPAk6UfxMdNtxWQAI4PfYj06CrT3gLrkql6HDicBfXMKS1k96B6r4Ink0jNAomZtQdMYgjRnEpPTOb2RUwbMZ-vK5Lb0RZlAZCMRsuXmQbNCQ53sW40FpMeQJB4TvdgZY3G1Hnp4Jqzli_TTNvuPbv8hHc_aU9-1STe0VHLZ4xiG1jECyxvAwiLftrKwUYjkfhAXbGdNsCAWDAb25Wdz0THeF02sB7RuiiRYcGJLf8lMdLjEkyLr-wr4NuFvJIPwvAns-vxiM_YWgKWOAZWEI9ioE-FF96GOU1PPOl_hx1D9Ak7fDSsfDuh-MCMz6rMLgfWSoAG-9WyaPGDtyx23lzHRMKM_KtzTgEtKjbWZ7iqYHt8ntkRWXLoaYqj13fHTAZ9R2hoNJ6LZH45EsbmYfhYoa3lYw4vxOLPq7G7FwCh6IqMTfLHbBsocS)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Latinos?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c8d867fe409b4615a9ab24c8d2c384b5&_e=S-w_jlWyE1BmDgi3Hro4O26Jg8piLM6rbX2VymHOJU3KtrXbjaFCTcI3EeKTIeHIZ74CuW0OPAk6UfxMdNtxWQAI4PfYj06CrT3gLrkql6HDicBfXMKS1k96B6r4Ink0jNAomZtQdMYgjRnEpPTOb2RUwbMZ-vK5Lb0RZlAZCMRsuXmQbNCQ53sW40FpMeQJB4TvdgZY3G1Hnp4Jqzli_TTNvuPbv8hHc_aU9-1STe0VHLZ4xiG1jECyxvAwiLftrKwUYjkfhAXbGdNsCAWDAZKgVuuwYy2eHUuw9I-CRO0vxLez7Oc4kcQSR-CpDPL9WEurq8aRMJcKeo8T4OMLlIjrJgsh2w1W5l1vLHOW6MhLtsTOAD2R3jzNzSFe-p-Bf85Q6KABH0UjICqD2kOhPSUCEiQs44G4m1b0xL_tXjHH8rVpczEv8xh6-yPlWe1fWMbtlnfYknTGFU-WynclN7iDzdpQ1uENVnepFoWQgRRJGnaQjw8qjhtkOIXYvKTV)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS ⇒ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c8d867fe409b4615a9ab24c8d2c384b5&_e=S-w_jlWyE1BmDgi3Hro4O26Jg8piLM6rbX2VymHOJU3KtrXbjaFCTcI3EeKTIeHIZ74CuW0OPAk6UfxMdNtxWQAI4PfYj06CrT3gLrkql6HDicBfXMKS1k96B6r4Ink0jNAomZtQdMYgjRnEpPTOb2RUwbMZ-vK5Lb0RZlAZCMRsuXmQbNCQ53sW40FpMeQJB4TvdgZY3G1Hnp4Jqzli_TTNvuPbv8hHc_aU9-1STe0VHLZ4xiG1jECyxvAwiLftrKwUYjkfhAXbGdNsCAWDAVjNZjXfZjyJ1zb6CD_i3wT-YGnlJbjav2_QXJMV8qbBvwAQGV006c72h1mHBQPAfCCbdzpwKXyWZGT_sbNll9GBAyov9B7CnRNxMxafOVh_u5NxaQ1Z4lyYFhp-CGsnON28zCNKGa9X1PCLbsVFcrajnlR8TG7BRX2iXESOIrTmR-mUHT5KCSbyPtYjes3ix9O0IQjfEdQAphunNuYQw3zrMTE5bEO8S9BpFoCuYhYD)
Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c8d867fe409b4615a9ab24c8d2c384b5&_e=S-w_jlWyE1BmDgi3Hro4O26Jg8piLM6rbX2VymHOJU3KtrXbjaFCTcI3EeKTIeHIZ74CuW0OPAk6UfxMdNtxWQAI4PfYj06CrT3gLrkql6HDicBfXMKS1k96B6r4Ink0jNAomZtQdMYgjRnEpPTOb2RUwbMZ-vK5Lb0RZlAZCMRsuXmQbNCQ53sW40FpMeQJB4TvdgZY3G1Hnp4Jqzli_TTNvuPbv8hHc_aU9-1STe0VHLZ4xiG1jECyxvAwiLftrKwUYjkfhAXbGdNsCAWDATb_74W_UWik972a8bW7p35K3Kmh2Tz9z0YZaO3g-TNOS8GetbTiv0KPKjOMmJLxVokKcROuWOaJ-blrUieq9qGFfPmaOcuEy3_9Z0X2x0NbwDo-sG3fYQVhXD6JALUWl1lfsHq8z74iakpDFz-6gQYJrFgtXXt9NZQo1lOSp2FcbcDtsny5W5t65McNsz_MqGAREMDNjPg4znvz4bgusY3dJcOKG0F_yxAK0rNYfGL3)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
Republican for Congress

clean_body: I nearly became the first Latina Republican elected to Congress from South Texas. I fell short by just 6,588 votes I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | Fellow patriot, Not too long ago, Latinos were expected and assumed to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican. I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a “coconut” - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a “self-hating Latino,” as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, a proud Latina Republican, and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY. Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by just 6,588 votes. I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others. As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority. In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more brown Republican women of color. Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.” But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable. Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today. If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, “If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.” Help me prove him right. Thank you for your time. Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez Republican for Congress | Paid for by Monica for Congress Don't want to receive our emails?

body:
I’m reaching out to you today to formally introduce myself and fill you in on my big announcement. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=34193dfb51f141819d35477520e9d660&_e=enHGCjPzDKt0Km-3bQLvTFl5CBoTM-G18YAQf9KiFXPwBFc-KOfdOJbQqJrUiti4l0mAnT3wVwhNmpMr8y3LNAFP80_wWt9RmVazEYbIdWcK9pqmqqGmOpqpmyvr1AULO12FQ6rBpd0KsmZerjd1C6gePb1yMLdTXMQWb0tzvg_ck8EYablohQ1HrGHskr3iH92qfQfEpUUVhkNkCThIIjmAdEMUHOce2oVlr2eDe3xmYv99dqP_lDK1b6BwusIdtqatNOinPHfCuQ14u95UCRT5t9tqE9RJxTwT9bS_khSaYclE-mhaaIdWaPVZtwYiuOEPiQxBbzfY15Nd7I8t0exLJG5r22ORcfwclV8onMPlY5K8VzsqJ3PbmN_U67pU01OUFti0Gn5O_Amsye-y7Q%3D%3D)

Peter,

I’m reaching out to you today to formally introduce myself and fill you in on my big announcement. My name is Major General Michael "Mick" McGuire, USAF (Ret.) and I’m a husband, a father, and a proud Arizonan.

Today, I am formally announcing my campaign for the U.S. Senate seat in Arizona. I’ll be facing Mark Kelly - Chuck Schumer’s right-hand man - [**and I need your support today in order to win this race and help Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority!**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=34193dfb51f141819d35477520e9d660&_e=enHGCjPzDKt0Km-3bQLvTFl5CBoTM-G18YAQf9KiFXPwBFc-KOfdOJbQqJrUiti4l0mAnT3wVwhNmpMr8y3LNAFP80_wWt9RmVazEYbIdWcK9pqmqqGmOpqpmyvr1AULO12FQ6rBpd0KsmZerjd1C6gePb1yMLdTXMQWb0tzvg_ck8EYablohQ1HrGHskr3iqYbPitpR1CfEUFoIKngZS0bqJJue13_GhguA8pyKTMQEcO6KhRQeAjDDYaWA3rSzPE2JaQwIzAjBDikUXpgt-v52od1u9bTMn0H4jQFyIGzBw_BTn6hCXDUmO4QZqn1RZ40RL1vAGTIxzegYT499fE8NqADOdEIw-sJgMbqD5ca5aKCQrHqWls6s9A6mh8IXXp5juUoajw7YLg8t-uwYgg%3D%3D)

[** ****JOIN MY TEAM ➤ **](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=34193dfb51f141819d35477520e9d660&_e=enHGCjPzDKt0Km-3bQLvTFl5CBoTM-G18YAQf9KiFXPwBFc-KOfdOJbQqJrUiti4l0mAnT3wVwhNmpMr8y3LNAFP80_wWt9RmVazEYbIdWcK9pqmqqGmOpqpmyvr1AULO12FQ6rBpd0KsmZerjd1C6gePb1yMLdTXMQWb0tzvg_ck8EYablohQ1HrGHskr3iZQyc_na11E4JdnsubGKZmhxTdojwwHf76hINodDfttMwI9TlqEHyj__ZX7NX4M1agfVbSmu-DP2ns3D0uc1R8c1oRdeeAHaj0ekTZcHbz_-cG4zGpANIJSycaEVSE3HlH2L9iOM0qr9p2NqfxqlnCc7SmMyFpUOEIdERo70etkIR8pUtuRmoGXay7e4MAFAFTm2rm8DnigWH0YkAsxX9rA%3D%3D)
Washington is broken. There are too many politicians who are only worried about making the right decision for THEMSELVES and NOT the American people they promised to protect.

As a former F-16 pilot and retired commanding general of the Arizona National Guard, I know what it takes to lead a team and make split second decisions that is the difference between saving and losing lives.

I’m ready on day one to fight for YOU and for what’s right for this country. That means:
1. Securing our border
2. Standing for life
3. Protecting our First and Second Amendment rights and
4. Walking shoulder to shoulder with law enforcement.

Each day the Left pushes our country further left, and we need a Senator in Arizona who will be a vote for our conservative way of life. I’m that vote, Peter.

I can win this race, but I need to hear from you today. [**Will you make a contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate? It doesn’t need to be much - even just $5 or $10 will give my campaign the momentum it needs to build a winning foundation.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=34193dfb51f141819d35477520e9d660&_e=enHGCjPzDKt0Km-3bQLvTFl5CBoTM-G18YAQf9KiFXPwBFc-KOfdOJbQqJrUiti4l0mAnT3wVwhNmpMr8y3LNAFP80_wWt9RmVazEYbIdWcK9pqmqqGmOpqpmyvr1AULO12FQ6rBpd0KsmZerjd1C6gePb1yMLdTXMQWb0tzvg_ck8EYablohQ1HrGHskr3iulgz-80cMMNpvu_sr7g4P7GnGEMremsx8O7X456FV1Ro6WjQ_9c-Bveijezrn1GRpTcvs4pK9kdll8iZzJkW6LzVF9_0uVVCN1Ji0cj-cr4NT5rBGtHdMFxbbAZ-rn058TIms0P_nvIRgAC9xFmKYdlUKYk_aHZKQxJ767zHW5D1kP0mCT4FyPw9klwZPl7QqMS_AClqIgTOtDkS3w5btw%3D%3D)

I’ll be facing Mark Kelly - Chuck Schumer’s right-hand man - Washington is broken. body:
Peter,
The fight is on! Val Demings officially announced that she is running to replace Marco Ruobio and help Democrats EXPAND our Senate majority. We need the full weight of our grassroots team in this critical fight, and we're hoping that you can step up today with a $25 donation.
We know it's a lot to ask, but Val Demings gives Democrats the best opportunity in the country to pick up a Senate seat and do away with one of Washington's most spineless Trump-sycophants, Marco Rubio. But she can't do it alone! Chip in today and help us stand with Val Demings to fight to take back Florida and expand our Senate majority. [Here's the link to give.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30598647/290042167/-29553365?refcode=OUT_20210610_GEN_FDR_K&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0N2VlNmM2LTQzY2EtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yHbbhj90pHDIfxIle3DPciTK-oRWL86aJgoIGC1jN1Y=)
Thanks for always standing with us,
When Democrats Turn Out
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: When Democrats Turn Out
Date: Fri, June 04, 2021
Subject: Marco Rubio could soon be out of the Senate

|
---

| | Peter, POLITICO broke the major news that Democratic Congresswoman Val Demings is running against Marco Rubio in the 2022 midterm elections. **This is a major pickup opportunity for Democrats.** This race is one of the most important Democratic pickups for the 2022 midterm elections, not only for its strategic importance in expanding our majority but also because Marco Rubio represents the worst of the Senate GOP, even calling the **BIPARTISAN** bill to investigate the January 6 insurrection a “partisan joke.” If Marco Rubio wants to know what a “partisan joke” _really_ looks like, all he has to do is find a mirror. Rubio has time and again placed his party over our country as one of Donald Trump's most ardent defenders in the Senate. And despite Rubio's flowery words after January 6, his outright refusal to vote to convict Donald Trump makes it even clearer that Rubio doesn't fight for his principles or our democracy. Instead, Rubio's undying allegiance is to Donald Trump's delicate ego and dangerous ambitions. | **[DONATE NOW TO BEAT RUBIO](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30598648/290042168/-29553365?refcode=OUT_20210610_GEN_FDR_K&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImI0N2VlNmM2LTQzY2EtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=yHbbhj90pHDIfxIle3DPciTK-oRWL86aJgoIGC1jN1Y=)**
---

We can't allow traitors like Rubio to serve one more day in the Senate than his term currently allows. That's why we need our grassroots army with candidates like Val Demings. Demings is our best chance to go up against and **DEFEAT** Rubio in the 2022 midterm election, and we don't have time to waste before taking action.

**That's why we've set an ambitious goal of raising $5,000 for our Secure the Senate fund so that candidates like Val Demings will have the full support of our grassroots army in their fight to expand our Senate majority.**

clean_body: Peter, The fight is on! Val Demings officially announced that she is running to replace Marco Ruobio and help Democrats EXPAND our Senate majority. We need the full weight of our grassroots team in this critical fight, and we're hoping that you can step up today with a $25 donation. We know it's a lot to ask, but Val Demings gives Democrats the best opportunity in the country to pick up a Senate seat and do away with one of Washington's most spineless Trump-sycophants, Marco Rubio. But she can't do it alone! Chip in today and help us stand with Val Demings to fight to take back Florida and expand our Senate majority. = Thanks for always standing with us, When Democrats Turn Out \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: When Democrats Turn Out Date: Fri, June 04, 2021 Subject: Marco Rubio could soon be out of the Senate | | | Peter, POLITICO broke the major news that Democratic Congresswoman Val Demings is running against Marco Rubio in the 2022 midterm elections. This is a major pickup opportunity for Democrats. This race is one of the most important Democratic pickups for the 2022 midterm elections, not only for its strategic importance in expanding our majority but also because Marco Rubio represents the worst of the Senate GOP, even calling the BIPARTISAN bill to investigate the January 6 insurrection a “partisan joke.” If Marco Rubio wants to know what a “partisan joke” really looks like, all he has to do is find a mirror. Rubio has time and again placed his party over our country as one of Donald Trump's most ardent defenders in the Senate. And despite Rubio's flowery words after January 6, his outright refusal to vote to convict Donald Trump makes it even clearer that Rubio doesn't fight for his principles or our democracy. Instead, Rubio's undying allegiance is to Donald Trump's delicate ego and dangerous ambitions. | = We can't allow traitors like Rubio to serve one more day in the Senate than his term currently allows. That's why we need our grassroots army with candidates like Val Demings. Demings is our best chance to go up against and DEFEAT Rubio in the 2022 midterm election, and we don't have time to waste before taking action. **[We can’t afford a single misstep, so please, donate today so Wilmot can continue making our great city as green, affordable and great as it can be!](http://links.wilmotcollins.com/u/click?_t=b4bff80b8cf1408796946ff9dd72c9b9&_m=08fe5f7dbf634b8b98ef0d0256be9e6c&_e=ktSInol1AnlNEkuyGjOvIjCSF2Le8O9ubAZ4Lb2lF35sxrciDEs3mwgqRIoIiMkW79cqkw4AqglnDwJ39wk1x3o6TRLGoLC25q1B9tYYgS7nTkFqjNnV-h0wGNqzkovOm6Ys_WFPi2D_KXVS2robwU69sTIw48KgF91y3Xb7HtTTCWXYP8dWVkPewqZmhqOmbWrjDeB_3VCJR70KEzIIY71RU986tsIlh9YF0-D3M3NHhvp8cZ3VRWfjdFFZNgYqbt7PWjD4vzUhaUohSwv1lDGQaVAxniGZekYy7t-BjcLy5kjYNqdNb--9aVatPDwXX366CBDbWrVtwyvKw0wvfRqGDkDf3ZD82S0LthBFavyH7nZ0DILS20z005yVOvab5Kdoay3LbERGE3l5EaBSJXGDqLBwbASq6Y6hou2cBkW_DVFGYtD-ISsIgrFWOIw03KN85ONowbp_n8EO5uRUrGH6LFD48iQ_JKUuMLjX68M%3D)**

subject: There’s only one Trump candidate in this race

body:
I want to make it clear where I stand on the issues... [](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=6c2065b8f93c45ab9a6fba80ad6a2479&_e=JNJbYccDJvpWbR8CjzhHsBymSws6t88pvBBurexQeetE-ko29dAvnlckkgQVymcoLFlC5ae1-524sZZIOGut9oGLac8Xt8Nf9lJ7EjNfGn0Z6IsHw0zgBvEIrtcBwEhhVU4ogXjZBhPDcCBN9RfJxJrA1eoyIuUttSSOWyF3f29eJ3gzMFUmewVJYvTKmjXvxSxSxXcj_xMquFSwzcZd0xbDV08aNRjtWY1gRwmUe9Q8Z-nYvO3CJPDLqviAzSxS7ay2FfWWRAB9ihw47gmqnD8GVdqRNNnaY-LzlHe8M89r631p43Iq62j1CEAX-fUci61ItLwf1HVqr_5XD5tutReBsCrVt214rlvzlpNHQBtYRNA0TjbaGonQCZbEFVBccthrTz-f5OXAOopFYMsmbm6fe56JMCM_rcrtfIUHZRxsaIob32SfrsuCdbOUhgqwDN66ugdD2HidyVHYXyFllpVdj6qx62X8tXmrMqG2oAp0TfMs_mM-iuI7hIIqSGqm) | |
---
Hey friend, it’s Jeff Bartos.

I want to address something. I want to make it clear where I stand on the issues and be completely transparent about my America First values.

**I’m the only candidate in this race that fully backs President Trump’s America First Agenda!**

Here’s where I stand on the issues:

**Election Integrity**

**Nancy Pelosi** and **Chuck Schumer** are trying to ram through election laws, and that would dictate how elections are run in your state via H.R. 1! Do you really trust them to write those laws fairly?****_**I sure as hell don’t!**_

We must protect the security of our elections with simple reforms like _**Mandatory Voter ID**_ , _**Banning Unsolicited Ballots**_ , and **_Accurate Voter Rolls!_**
[**Fight for Election Integrity**](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=6c2065b8f93c45ab9a6fba80ad6a2479&_e=JNJbYccDJvpWbR8CjzhHsBymSws6t88pvBBurexQeetE-ko29dAvnlckkgQVymcoLFlC5ae1-524sZZIOGut9oGLac8Xt8Nf9lJ7EjNfGn0Z6IsHw0zgBvEIrtcBwEhhVU4ogXjZBhPDcCBN9RfJxJrA1eoyIuUttSSOWyF3f29eJ3gzMFUmewVJYvTKmjXvxSxSxXcj_xMquFSwzcZd0xbDV08aNRjtWY1gRwmUe9Q8Z-nYvO3CJPDLqviAzSxS7ay2FfWWRAB9ihw47gmqnD8GVdqRNNnaY-LzlHe8M889v01ienm8k4gTCSdYM6G-7nN-h0XNHRQLu70Q09DVbnFIXp-Ux-JNYGsGizpc-PL2MKV8_a2CyKT8LMeryaVO6Ao8Lzwqzx7IdJKlW3ByE_I7BouCKnF6DDB8kkq_8rVL2JR5HZLp5cYL4opMqSq2XVqmdvJbipSSMfRGj8d2DoisHlx9s1-N8yyNV9RMFBemcHLGlxmPP8totFZR6ShO)
|
---
**The 2nd Amendment**

**I am a firm defender of the 2nd Amendment.** Unlike Democrats, I actually want to address the root of the problem of gun violence affecting American cities, not just blanket ban firearms from American citizens.

Joe Biden showed his disdain for the 2nd Amendment when he nominated a gun-control radical to the ATF.
[**Defend the 2nd Amendment**](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=6c2065b8f93c45ab9a6fba80ad6a2479&_e=JNJbYccDJvpWbR8CjzhHsBymSws6t88pvBBurexQeetE-ko29dAvnlckkgQVymcoLFlC5ae1-524sZZIOGut9oGLac8Xt8Nf9lJ7EjNfGn0Z6IsHw0zgBvEIrtcBwEhhVU4ogXjZBhPDcCBN9RfJxJrA1eoyIuUttSSOWyF3f29eJ3gzMFUmewVJYvTKmjXvxSxSxXcj_xMquFSwzcZd0xbDV08aNRjtWY1gRwmUe9Q8Z-nYvO3CJPDLqviAzSxS7ay2FfWWRAB9ihw47gmqnD8GVdqRNNnaY-LzlHe8M89PyGH2YE5MGHvqYcfsBNyfsTYE-sBunoGomuF7stEFPSJboz9FR3L6ZAekzGrkkIh4VGAESO84D05Pq2A7Cd0Y-5nAGV6631DX0UVCFtuBDF27h1x7ATKS89KS6gQJP-Co7dQtHUirk25-u1_GhdbQNPxUxg11VOL6RtoOQy5ncXxsV_A4Ji_dhBh1PuKNSeus7VC8ki-9fwF5Mf6IZTmQ)
|
---
**Illegal Immigration**
** **
We need to be honest. Joe Biden and democrats are open-border radicals. _**Lawless Sanctuary Cities**_**.** _**Refusing to Deport Criminal Gangs**_. **_Taxpayer-Funded Stimulus Checks and Free Hotels Rooms from Illegal Immigrants_.**
** **
_“Without borders, we don’t have a country_ ” - President Trump.
** **
He was exactly right. We need to send a message that American taxpayers shouldn’t be bailing out this Biden-created border crisis, and we need to Secure our Borders!
[**Safe and Secure Borders Now**](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=6c2065b8f93c45ab9a6fba80ad6a2479&_e=JNJbYccDJvpWbR8CjzhHsBymSws6t88pvBBurexQeetE-ko29dAvnlckkgQVymcoLFlC5ae1-524sZZIOGut9oGLac8Xt8Nf9lJ7EjNfGn0Z6IsHw0zgBvEIrtcBwEhhVU4ogXjZBhPDcCBN9RfJxJrA1eoyIuUttSSOWyF3f29eJ3gzMFUmewVJYvTKmjXvxSxSxXcj_xMquFSwzcZd0xbDV08aNRjtWY1gRwmUe9Q8Z-nYvO3CJPDLqviAzSxS7ay2FfWWRAB9ihw47gmqnD8GVdqRNNnaY-LzlHe8M8---YskCC0I8nFJSe7iL9P8VlJQjYhT7HqjCifqXS25O1XcbvmoYtYVo98TPMUH7xXpz4LVTeM0Qm7Sv5bES4UT1JmNrXDAjftW0oCZFmTcELE2Gdc4w_plHw7r_1LFdeXMhnYRdiTZSMEgNUU--hvncUpTdzXOUfnVlLDgwlpDhcFvTq_hn4fsjetAan5ULrluJcNWi5ZkchUUrDpawKBR)
|
---
**Big Tech Censorship**
** **
Big Tech is out of control, and free speech is at risk. The Tech Tyrants aren’t even hiding the fact that it operates more like a Democrat Super PAC than a private company.
** **
They silence and de-platform conservatives like President Trump, but they will not take action against the Supreme Leader of Iran, who is calling for a second Holocaust.
** **
**When I get to the Senate, one of my main priorities will be to bring Big Tech to heel.**
[**Rein in the Tech Tyrants**](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=6c2065b8f93c45ab9a6fba80ad6a2479&_e=JNJbYccDJvpWbR8CjzhHsBymSws6t88pvBBurexQeetE-ko29dAvnlckkgQVymcoLFlC5ae1-524sZZIOGut9oGLac8Xt8Nf9lJ7EjNfGn0Z6IsHw0zgBvEIrtcBwEhhVU4ogXjZBhPDcCBN9RfJxJrA1eoyIuUttSSOWyF3f29eJ3gzMFUmewVJYvTKmjXvxSxSxXcj_xMquFSwzcZd0xbDV08aNRjtWY1gRwmUe9Q8Z-nYvO3CJPDLqviAzSxS7ay2FfWWRAB9ihw47gmqnD8GVdqRNNnaY-LzlHe8M89WnikbhMSVGJRaZAFvXRG-PFdm6WiDPuYMuraMNYPeK0yqkAvWuCaexWcHvNHMYC-I5Wrf3gbkOYB18Nst5CSD-up0hgPau0aQBPcGB_lp9snDXGyaaMfiB_lDi-zfDI8ydjlEPcog2z5kTsnHUcQs1o6L9PYSvwVjLFuhvzMAOwNT6bfLzGmP4pKPsyybMHT5WYIqSEosdz7Ir0nR1nhq)
|
---
Friend, if you stand with me and President Trump on any of these issues and want to see them solved, then now is the time to fight back!
** **
_[**That’s why I’m asking you to help me Take Back the Senate Majority and send an America First Conservative to the Senate >>**](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=6c2065b8f93c45ab9a6fba80ad6a2479&_e=JNJbYccDJvpWbR8CjzhHsBymSws6t88pvBBurexQeetE-ko29dAvnlckkgQVymcoLFlC5ae1-524sZZIOGut9oGLac8Xt8Nf9lJ7EjNfGn0Z6IsHw0zgBvEIrtcBwEhhVU4ogXjZBhPDcCBN9RfJxJrA1eoyIuUttSSOWyF3f29eJ3gzMFUmewVJYvTKmjXvxSxSxXcj_xMquFSwzcZd0xbDV08aNRjtWY1gRwmUe9Q8Z-nYvO3CJPDLqviAzSxS7ay2FfWWRAB9ihw47gmqnD8GVdqRNNnaY-LzlHe8M88X2RH5EWt0KldDrV7P5GgBkI_-ONcjXkvEizG5_RkG7ww5YkKsRdByB7jCP-kDI4tszt4MTbmHUEtU5rsLyQZh6Bz5W53iD9Lz-0pQOwjwpLBiklbPp5PykYVeBpfnwZ5feNrpFzT8hkDyiXXy3m8boK6mrUFOU4NK_EjPh4v9uWwRNc0XsOwrkLhJoZITWDxUO3RNenk5ajSy7lVLv9Zo)_
** **
Thank you,
Jeff Bartos
[**Support an America First Conservative**](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=6c2065b8f93c45ab9a6fba80ad6a2479&_e=JNJbYccDJvpWbR8CjzhHsBymSws6t88pvBBurexQeetE-ko29dAvnlckkgQVymcoLFlC5ae1-524sZZIOGut9oGLac8Xt8Nf9lJ7EjNfGn0Z6IsHw0zgBvEIrtcBwEhhVU4ogXjZBhPDcCBN9RfJxJrA1eoyIuUttSSOWyF3f29eJ3gzMFUmewVJYvTKmjXvxSxSxXcj_xMquFSwzcZd0xbDV08aNRjtWY1gRwmUe9Q8Z-nYvO3CJPDLqviAzSxS7ay2FfWWRAB9ihw47gmqnD8GVdqRNNnaY-LzlHe8M8__nq9Ue9zFDgIjyMNFrmDIZ848mnIXyawkchkd5R7XInF_14xTBHnJ3x4q85m83oFEqMive_TeqzVXXJYM27jaj2uOqgizBOENTgRx3jQw5qpd6Cbtf7mduJRaeudEcjtKLQJuCDbhM1M2Cqd0asJIoU2XHlfDYmpdjKqPXss6PfKy4l0A1DApBf8h7g6yWlo4mlu4qqCfoKYfdT2M77L4)

name: Fair Fight #momsquad
subject: Hot Call Summer
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MOMS IN OFFICE
body:
Help us support Fair Fight Action to mobilize volunteers around the For the People Act. Hi Peter, We can't wait any longer for Congress to act and preserve our right to vote--we need our to Senators to pass the For The People Act (HR1/S1). Republicans are determined to suppress the right to vote. This year alone, we’ve already seen over 360 pieces of legislation introduced at the state level aimed at limiting access to the ballot box. That’s why it is so important that we pass H.R. 1-- the For the People Act. The bill aims to fight dark money in politics, expand voting rights, and end partisan gerrymandering. **The Hot Call Summer campaign by Fair Fight Action aims to drive daily phone calls to U.S. Senators from every state in the weeks leading up to the Senate vote on the For the People Act. ** Fair Fight Action needs to work harder than ever and around the clock in the month of June to reach Senators, mobilize volunteers, and text over 10 million voters. **[This is why Moms for Fair Fight set the ambitious goal to raise $5k for Stacey Abrams in the next 24 hours.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30600592/290056630/200467634?refcode=0610&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5MTk5Nzg5LTRjY2EtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hfZaIbUoPNd0eceVEtupv_bTq4OsheHtNL3iJKxbfIA=)** In order to pass the For The People Act, we need your help to make sure our Senators know how important this legislation is. **[Rush a donation to help our #momsquad support Stacey today and join our fight to preserve the right to vote for the next generation.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30600593/290056631/200467634?refcode=0610&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5MTk5Nzg5LTRjY2EtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hfZaIbUoPNd0eceVEtupv_bTq4OsheHtNL3iJKxbfIA=)** Peter, no matter where you live, no matter what your Senator has already said, call your US Senators every day in June to demand that the Senate passes the For The People Act to protect our freedom to vote. This is about our country, our right to vote, and preserving Democracy for our kids. **[Can I count on you today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30600594/290056632/200467634?refcode=0610&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5MTk5Nzg5LTRjY2EtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hfZaIbUoPNd0eceVEtupv_bTq4OsheHtNL3iJKxbfIA=)** **Call 888-453-3211 to be connected to your Senators now and don’t be afraid to call them every day.** Thank you for all that you do! Simona Grace Founder and Executive Director Moms in Office **#momsquad** [**CHIP IN**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30600595/290056633/200467634?refcode=0610&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5MTk5Nzg5LTRjY2EtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hfZaIbUoPNd0eceVEtupv_bTq4OsheHtNL3iJKxbfIA=) | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30600596/290056634/-2114815409?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5MTk5Nzg5LTRjY2EtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hfZaIbUoPNd0eceVEtupv_bTq4OsheHtNL3iJKxbfIA=&emci=eaa60020-4aca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=39199789-4cca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2884131) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30600597/290056635/-1042187117?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5MTk5Nzg5LTRjY2EtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hfZaIbUoPNd0eceVEtupv_bTq4OsheHtNL3iJKxbfIA=&emci=eaa60020-4aca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=39199789-4cca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2884131) | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/30600598/290056636/-977212835?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4MjY1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5MTk5Nzg5LTRjY2EtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=hfZaIbUoPNd0eceVEtupv_bTq4OsheHtNL3iJKxbfIA=&emci=eaa60020-4aca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=39199789-4cca-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=2884131)

name: Ethan Zorfas
subject: Mandel leads Timken by 19 and Vance by 29
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Josh A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc
body:
To: Interested Parties
From: Kristin Davison & Ethan Zorfas, Lead Strategists - Josh Mandel
for US Senate
Date: June 8, 2021
Subj: Mandel leads Timken by 19 and Vance by 29

We thought you’d want to see the most recent polling in the race for US Senate in Ohio. The full results of the poll are below but here are a few key takeaways:
* **Josh’s Mandel’s lead remains consistently strong at 19 points ahead of Jane Timken and 29 points ahead of JD Vance**

* Mandel’s lead has remained consistent despite Jane Timken spending $600,000 on a barrage of 10,000 TV ads

* Mandel’s campaign has the support of key Conservative organizations including the Club for Growth, Senate Conservatives Fund and Ohio Values Voters

* The polling firm that conducted this poll, Remington Research Group, is a nationally recognized leader in accuracy. In the 2016 Presidential election, Remington was one of only two firms that correctly predicted President Trump’s election. In 2021 Remington was named one of the most accurate GOP polling companies in the nation (**[Link here](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/u/click?_t=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_m=c6cbcf2e56e4477eaac73a4f7d514515&_e=0vv6L6TI3tAd2OEcPdrIYnpUrcz8c2TG-fxUiq1IWD9-1e3tAyUkEM0lP4dPur3zUehNcYTJch7qCbBsTovc_UXlMQVsegJVJwKkrutDqCjJff3O70_DOxMDYej3-to4vZnzZxigB6TeUteml2P_ukc2n8e1NNjmHnE8hW0N56CY1XPwz5V-uO8PFliqRRWufV8MeGdKvGoSyXPmw-2lvyZZa_U-FT6q_8dS6LUCMp_MC0P9aucYfFx1mC5XXWHcFfMwedpdzKfrJAILnYDSsAAD3OkpV68qep7rByfUqTTPVdeexO5SbmNdFMiE-S60J2zJ2uMh0-GPQtyDaCzs4g%3D%3D)**).

The full results of the poll are below. If you would like to financially support the campaign, please **[click here](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/u/click?_t=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_m=c6cbcf2e56e4477eaac73a4f7d514515&_e=0vv6L6TI3tAd2OEcPdrIYoCiagUgcCDC3_ILtF2GehvuqGZlbBDwHwPB-_S1Q9vhXVHmJ5dXXpKqq7WuY6L8Xk9Kg2c7xiELULk6nbC2UMGYg9TmSUqrJE5XS2p6YzKLmuz2ayqGU4A-nxmLFHQeKhnpxsANkhKkYlAW2x8y5uMZLfQj9FSexnBLv2pYWFBVLugBm5rbUuzpCuM3fVJf-iei5kTbEhGp_8REHQ-5c_Yk6mG0vUKjG4kUMrXCaXh-OrJQ9Nq6m3xhbgCY4AlGUMZxcRON1Jy7RRJO7wmnK4U%3D)** or reply to this email. **KEY POLL FINDINGS: MANDEL LEADS TIMKEN BY 19 POINTS, VANCE BY 29 POINTS** The data in the latest polling conducted by Remington Research Group show that likely 2022 Republican Primary Election voters in Ohio continue to favor Josh Mandel as the party’s nominee for U.S. Senate. The race remains unmoved from data gathered in late March and early April despite Timken’s aggressive early TV advertising spend.
**BALLOTS** The survey tested two ballots, one head to head between Mandel and Timken; and the other a six way horse race. Mandel led both ballots, **besting Timken by 23 point and leading the seven candidate field by 19 points**. These ballot tests show a race that remains unchanged from early spring. **_Head to Head_** **_Q7: If the candidates in the Republican primary election for U.S. Senate were Jane Timken and Josh Mandel, and the election were held today, for whom would you vote?_** **_ _** **_Josh Mandel: 45%_** **_Jane Timken: 22%_** **_Undecided: 33%_** **_ _** **_Full Field of Candidates_** Mandel leads a seven-candidate field by 19 points. In early April, Mandel led the field by 22 points. The movement on this ballot is margin of error. **_Q: Possible candidates in the 2022 Republican Primary Election for United States Senate are Jane Timken, Josh Mandel, J.D. Vance, Mike Gibbons, Bernie Moreno, and Matt Dolan. If the election were held today, for whom would you vote?_** **_ _** **_Josh Mandel: 35%_** **_Jane Timken: 16%_** **_J.D. Vance: 6%_** **_Mike Gibbons: 5%_** **_Bernie Moreno: 2%_** **_Matt Dolan: 2%_** **_Undecided: 34% (30%) (33%)_** **_ _** Like previous surveys, Mandel has a commanding lead with the most important subset of GOP primary voters, those identifying themselves as Trump Republicans. Mandel’s lead with this group of voters is 24 points. Mandel also leads by 24points with those who identify as “Faith Based” voters. **CANDIDATE IMAGES** The data show that among all declared and likely candidates for U.S. Senate, Josh Mandel has the highest name identification. Mandel has a 68% hard name ID with next highest contender, Jane Timken, only possessing 40%. Timken’s hard-name ID has only risen two points in the past two months. Since February, Jane Timken has spent nearly $600,000 to bolster her name identification and polling position. Despite this ad blitz, she still trails Josh Mandel by 19 points and her image has remained stagnant. **_Q: What is your opinion of Josh Mandel?_** **_Favorable: 46%_** **_Unfavorable: 22%_** **_No opinion: 32%_** **_
Q: What is your opinion of Jane Timken?_** **_Favorable: 23%_** **_Unfavorable: 17%_** **_No opinion: 60%_** **METHODOLOGY** Survey conducted June 1 through June 3, 2021. 1,040 likely 2022 Republican Primary voters participated in the survey. Survey weighted to match expected turnout demographics for the 2022 Republican Primary Election. Margin of Error is+/-3% with a 95% level of confidence. Totals do not always equal 100% due to rounding. The survey was conducted by phone to both landlines (65%) and cell phones (35%.) Thank you for your support, Ethan Z Paid for by Team Josh A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc., Justice Opportunity Strength Honor PAC, and Shelby County Republican Party Federal Account. PO Box 24875, Mayfield Heights, OH 44124
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). Don't want to receive these emails anymore? [Unsubscribe](http://links.joshmandel2022.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=128ebb110d2d4fa293c540634a1733e0&_s=c6cbcf2e56e4477eaac73a4f7d514515&_t=xlI_XcnvPYzsa6ebpM9hsTxQ-qXfduubv5Hk59vU6ZYHtaUsRmOZsXgbtjwRJbhSToXJLqPmxzNnwEqPvsvXD9H5lLGjYEv92EZRK3cQ-n-V9EU7ktqA1Z2dGadyuA-I5Uh_6wOoMCbwCAR5c-N49YrSeaQ78e3DiSnStitZY_k%3D)

Vance, Mike Gibbons, Bernie Moreno, and Matt Dolan. If the election were held today, for whom would you vote? Josh Mandel: 35% Jane Timken: 16% J.D. Vance: 6% Mike Gibbons: 5% Bernie Moreno: 2% Matt Dolan: 2% Undecided: 34% (30%) (33%) Like previous surveys, Mandel has a commanding lead with the most important subset of GOP primary voters, those identifying themselves as Trump Republicans. Mandel’s lead with this group of voters is 24 points. Mandel also leads by 24points with those who identify as “Faith Based” voters. CANDIDATE IMAGES The data show that among all declared and likely candidates for U.S. Senate, Josh Mandel has the highest name identification. Mandel has a 68% hard name ID with next highest contender, Jane Timken, only possessing 40%. Timken’s hard-name ID has only risen two points in the past two months. Since February, Jane Timken has spent nearly $600,000 to bolster her name identification and polling position. Despite this ad blitz, she still trails Josh Mandel by 19 points and her image has remained stagnant. Q: What is your opinion of Josh Mandel? Favorable: 46% Unfavorable: 22% No opinion: 32% Q: What is your opinion of Jane Timken? Favorable: 23% Unfavorable: 17% No opinion: 60% METHODOLOGY Survey conducted June 1 through June 3, 2021. 1,040 likely 2022 Republican Primary voters participated in the survey. Survey weighted to match expected turnout demographics for the 2022 Republican Primary Election. Margin of Error is+/-3% with a 95% level of confidence. Totals do not always equal 100% due to rounding. The survey was conducted by phone to both landlines (65%) and cell phones (35%.) Thank you for your support, Ethan Z Paid for by Team Josh A joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Citizens for Josh Mandel, Inc., Justice Opportunity Strength Honor PAC, and Shelby County Republican Party Federal Account. PO Box 24875, Mayfield Heights, OH 44124

clean_body: | | | | You have to see this! Friend, Did you see this?! Team Kelly is in the LEAD! Another poll shows us WINNING! Alaskans won’t be fooled, we have seen what Murkowski is willing to stand for, and it is not our Conservative values! Check out the poll numbers for yourself: For too long, Lisa Murkowski has caved to the DC Insiders and the Radical Left. Even after the Biden administration continues to attack our Energy Industry, Murkowski refuses to speak up! All eyes are on this crucial Senate race and we need all the support we can get. We know the Washington Swamp will pour everything they can into this race to keep Murkowski in power! What those same Insiders don’t know, is the power of our strong, grassroots Conservative support! It’s time we take our America First Conservative values to the halls of the Senate! For Alaska, Kelly P.S. -- Team Kelly needs Conservatives like you to join the fight! kellyforak.com | | | | ==

name: John Fetterman
subject: re: my op-ed in CNN
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
If I get to the U.S. Senate, I'll be 100% on board with saving our democracy.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210610-1719-header&t=1&akid=1719%2E434096%2EzEGP19)
Peter,
It was a _reeeeal_ shame to me to hear that Joe Manchin is planning to vote with Mitch McConnell + the GOP to uphold the filibuster and block the passage of the For the People Act.
**Here's what I can promise to you, Peter: If I get to the U.S. Senate, I'll be 100% on board with saving our democracy — but I'll need your urgent help to get there.**
I think common-sense legislation to expand voting rights is a no-brainer — which is why I recently wrote an op-ed for CNN explaining why protecting our democracy is so important.
**[Take a look at this excerpt of what I wrote, then please chip in your first $5 so that we can flip this Senate seat, abolish the Jim Crow filibuster, and finally get things done for working people.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20165?refcode=em20210610-1719&t=2&akid=1719%2E434096%2EzEGP19)**
* * *
**[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20165?refcode=em20210610-1719&t=3&akid=1719%2E434096%2EzEGP19)**
If I was in the Senate now, my “yes” vote on the For The People Act would not be about my party. It would not be about politics. This is about doing what I know is right, guaranteeing everyone has the right to vote.
The contents of the bill are not controversial. And the fact that zero Republicans have signed on to a bill designed to ensure all Americans are granted their constitutional right to cast a ballot says far more about the state of the Republican party than the bill itself.
We need to pass S.1 through the Senate and send it to President Biden’s desk. And when Senate Republicans attempt to tank the bill by using the racist filibuster, then the Democrats — including Joe Manchin — must take action and abolish the filibuster to make sure S.1 is passed. The Democrats who are refusing to reform the filibuster are telling us that a silly Senate rule is more important to them than democracy itself. They’re wrong.
We don’t have much time and we need to act now. It is time to abolish the filibuster. Pass the For the People Act. Our democracy depends on it.
* * *
Thanks for reading a few of my thoughts on passing the For the People Act and abolishing the filibuster. You can read the full op-ed I wrote for CNN by **[clicking here.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20166?t=4&akid=1719%2E434096%2EzEGP19)**
**Before you go, I have a quick favor to ask:[Will you chip in your first $5 to our campaign today if you're on board with our fight to flip this seat and save our democracy?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20165?refcode=em20210610-1719&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=1719%2E434096%2EzEGP19)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/20165?refcode=em20210610-1719&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=1719%2E434096%2EzEGP19)**
Thank you,
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210610-1719-footer&t=25&refcode2=1719_434096_zEGP19&akid=1719%2E434096%2EzEGP19)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=26&akid=1719%2E434096%2EzEGP19)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=1719%2E434096%2EzEGP19)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

It’s Senator Tim Scott, and I need you to take action today to help me and my fellow Senate Republicans win back the Senate.

I wish Republicans still had the Senate majority and I weren’t having to write this email to you today **[asking for your assistance](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3755c9efa35a48fa8da26f9c1558bcd6&_e=ZA8Pa4f5GUGtFdBMBhxjGIYl8pas8QoJxazNB6TZzQ9qSMzIqBUAxX159qcvwWYYEW1IsgmWXW8jfy6Ks-YSf-kxsv4MNqLOS9XZvbhDCBrbtfdKN8YbU4Oy3rAP4tVHNAY5QMGt5m6FR6Ys6bEP2eAU3la-T_ZgO6GmEO37eSClDIIjeH8y-nuU5i7xCS10MRoZiw1Nl0uG5DkzCYrIL0viWY7E870xBWLvxF8w1LRBwTlT62CQfFycTDNLLlQ3RzuFPzX0G7-e0sfymDEvzqzpRdH7HMyEuH8S5yCuloZBGzyDiQjLkRuHsguANu81YE7KjH-shFVD6hAMxa5PGozgdcEIj_Ykxmp6RG7ZmyU6wATYEbsK7Kvy0JU0GKVNqRBTEiEJuOic5_ZXld5VdC2l1BjKPNFUPOBSjK47uuJbfLdVY1QsgC2vE0L-Uq2HF8XYrx1UWmTjfio1aJuikg%3D%3D)** in helping us win it back, but here we are. Frankly, I am not sure a lot of folks realize what is at stake with Democrats in full control of Washington.

I’ll break it down for you:
1. **$6 TRILLION in additional federal spending**. Dems don’t care how to pay for it.
2. **Federalization of elections.** They don’t really care who goes to vote as long as new voters vote Democrat, all the while claiming Republicans are guilty of systemic racism.
3. **TWO new deep blue states** accompanied by two new DEM senators each. This would cement a Democrat majority for generations to come.
4. **Nuking of the Filibuster**. While this is a harder get for Dems, they’re putting maximum pressure on centrist democrats to cave and support stripping the minority party of any protection still available.

**[It’s paramount you’re on our team](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=3755c9efa35a48fa8da26f9c1558bcd6&_e=ZA8Pa4f5GUGtFdBMBhxjGIYl8pas8QoJxazNB6TZzQ9qSMzIqBUAxX159qcvwWYYEW1IsgmWXW8jfy6Ks-YSf-kxsv4MNqLOS9XZvbhDCBrbtfdKN8YbU4Oy3rAP4tVHNAY5QMGt5m6FR6Ys6bEP2eAU3la-T_ZgO6GmEO37eSClDIIjeH8y-nuU5i7xCS10MRoZiw1Nl0uG5DkzCYrIL0viWY7E870xBWLvxF8w1LRBwTlT62CQfFycTDNLLlQ3DX1zjKsGgUDWswSe6c54LMdhD7uQGjP0Nuh2jjHyxOfi1fZykhQay_lpdzXvBKjw4I3c9mqUJMAJYAzr1liouSXIPXfH7Lyfry20At6YUkkf86m8wVy51X8FowhJ5i9us8qyHG1F40VjEN--nv3Aqi4gwF92aj8uEdXa4mzznKFOOlIiig6t-0YdX2ZkvMMpv_6EkbB8_Ij-XSTyvR0a9w%3D%3D)**.

**Memo** : We need your immediate help to keep pace with my opponent and national democrats »

Fellow Conservative,

The purpose of this email to inform you of the overall fundraising goal that we’ve set for the month of June. I have to admit to you, I’m a bit nervous we’re going to fail to reach our goals and I’m hoping you can help.

You see, **we only have 22 days left** until the end of the second fundraising quarter, which means we only have 22 days to hit our goal of raising $100,000 for the quarter. Reaching this fundraising milestone will qualify me for the National Republican Party’s “On the radar” program for promising candidates.

The most recent time that I checked the numbers (this morning) we are short $30,000. We’ve done the math and **[if everyone who has donated since I launched my campaign last makes an additional donation of $7, we would hit our goal easily.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=541062d42b774508bb805880da0636ed&_e=4XtPpKOHCmTc9r2N7WtE321ENeug0_OTKGowX2npeCK72j27GHlniCKSLXMyB-j6UB9QdAyY1HDlMJNNmz5rDrLiwErTcUqptCJ4we3lI9G6RGPmauCJZ0P9u0w9phGbUzqUjkFIKa03mt1yibvHR8CThi9CXLUwbSQ0dP21Ma4nBd_U1q8r5Z8YwurIY1826K0wEvTcG_mhk8Wt5iO6HPzF6XzE1_LEvS1usQya1HGQy34fZQ71rkbN-Zho_qwCYzntNbr70FYl2WqHcgpwp82w3mtLWfi08XK9DZf--dXqJCSYbV4qeWjKV_4_aols9eQnG7aDPj5OzYurqBko986uacgmaoxCn9GiryRqylJX5QGjyfE-SE3t-5fptZy4HGgF5ifAGfGBVBU8wclE0E9Axax0ejZF3z-95xB8yZ_FQj1G6nm8oc_jni_rrJwaeKZkqYv-UZ5X1QgvEo9M-A%3D%3D)**

| _**PLEASE CHIP-IN[$7 OR MORE TODAY](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=541062d42b774508bb805880da0636ed&_e=4XtPpKOHCmTc9r2N7WtE321ENeug0_OTKGowX2npeCK72j27GHlniCKSLXMyB-j6UB9QdAyY1HDlMJNNmz5rDrLiwErTcUqptCJ4we3lI9G6RGPmauCJZ0P9u0w9phGbUzqUjkFIKa03mt1yibvHR8CThi9CXLUwbSQ0dP21Ma4nBd_U1q8r5Z8YwurIY1826K0wEvTcG_mhk8Wt5iO6HPzF6XzE1_LEvS1usQya1HGQy34fZQ71rkbN-Zho_qwCYPltCS2_1wWGmUrhf9AdQnjxqYuP6kAcJH4b9VlgZ7oopIP5HhcUMKf-l7wHQNV08qs8BQp1bWau5CXUg8UifAzrCO5UJSFR6ZlEQyAf0AkzWk5HAsvbw5IMuL4jT7C3pmruCAYhpVWzSkLCHcXRE2YgvbhV_U48WxR1LOfQOVEXhBWlxuzMODBzNMyb3XqWBuv0FayIVdhVwmpWqU2Cxg%3D%3D)** _

[** HELP ME QUALIFY FOR "On the Radar" ➞ **](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=541062d42b774508bb805880da0636ed&_e=4XtPpKOHCmTc9r2N7WtE321ENeug0_OTKGowX2npeCK72j27GHlniCKSLXMyB-j6UB9QdAyY1HDlMJNNmz5rDrLiwErTcUqptCJ4we3lI9G6RGPmauCJZ0P9u0w9phGbUzqUjkFIKa03mt1yibvHR8CThi9CXLUwbSQ0dP21Ma4nBd_U1q8r5Z8YwurIY1826K0wEvTcG_mhk8Wt5iO6HPzF6XzE1_LEvS1usQya1HGQy34fZQ71rkbN-Zho_qwCfzQ1R123e3u7izbCR0COxHYJsf2nvK-TEoFnK9BirRippDzv4wxKVhtwluwdy5MsxbtrCaCewu3gjQsghEvngm8w-owyXyMBLS0sokk0kpxnFh7iyVFWJ8k9t8FLVQHtDFLBSIlHUoljtwWC58gQ4pJLlwjbpFtzJsEvv1DRSl-HEaWjGsWqtr8stqh3Z_qdzxpOv9QKy3iGzJMqQlPc_g%3D%3D)

We’re falling behind my Democrat opponent in overall donations

**Why It’s Important** : Democrats are showcasing their fundraising strength a full 1.5 years before the midterm election, and they’re funneling money to my opponent – **more than $100,000 already in small dollar contributions**

**My Ask:** Our total donations are down by more than 50% this quarter vs this time last year. **[We need your help today if we’re going to reach our fundraising goals by the time the quarter ends on June 30th](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=541062d42b774508bb805880da0636ed&_e=4XtPpKOHCmTc9r2N7WtE321ENeug0_OTKGowX2npeCK72j27GHlniCKSLXMyB-j6UB9QdAyY1HDlMJNNmz5rDrLiwErTcUqptCJ4we3lI9G6RGPmauCJZ0P9u0w9phGbUzqUjkFIKa03mt1yibvHR8CThi9CXLUwbSQ0dP21Ma4nBd_U1q8r5Z8YwurIY1826K0wEvTcG_mhk8Wt5iO6HPzF6XzE1_LEvS1usQya1HGQy34fZQ71rkbN-Zho_qwCN1JZHdGA1RaJIzpN9vemeu2pN2Q-uEZozC0djPKouj9YdtBlEX3Cg8_IQbGcbc0XMrm_oadyhYkYF8DRhIwi3aqVyoDxtps0N_SHFQycEwbuUAS31ioZm6e5yLuYdIU_TwLmRBXZQbyfKijU-4_mZAZkl3oaAf_habO79lhaAmHYSoyEdGOk1Cficbeo_JvVWDbswlN1pOQYovcVVvnLSQ%3D%3D)**

Last quarter my Democrat opponent, Peter DeFazio, chairman of the House Transportation Committee – and **the man charged with making Biden’s $6 trillion budget a reality** – raised a full **43% more** than he did this time last year. That has my team on edge. Peter DeFazio knows what my team is capable of; he knows my team and I are focused and adept fundraisings, and he’s preparing early this time around. I’m **[calling on you for help today](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=541062d42b774508bb805880da0636ed&_e=4XtPpKOHCmTc9r2N7WtE321ENeug0_OTKGowX2npeCK72j27GHlniCKSLXMyB-j6UB9QdAyY1HDlMJNNmz5rDrLiwErTcUqptCJ4we3lI9G6RGPmauCJZ0P9u0w9phGbUzqUjkFIKa03mt1yibvHR8CThi9CXLUwbSQ0dP21Ma4nBd_U1q8r5Z8YwurIY1826K0wEvTcG_mhk8Wt5iO6HPzF6XzE1_LEvS1usQya1HGQy34fZQ71rkbN-Zho_qwCmfEmsB7icRXb6Bj5qV8e94zAwu9x_wbsHXt0QshXarNg-tSpSU3dGzVX8QOzS-VNnVpnQpoNoFg8HWL5wBuLts95A24myBGdZ9BTN7Ee4BXOxwJdCZ1FSCOKcOGHlgYbI4s6veeMsm6x-07OjaBDc6YXAaCxvqOWMaNUZj6QWDgqMizFcfVXzjLq9JXPVie0Z5eMZJ6L4qfSlxxNVC-4zQ%3D%3D)** because our success is directly correlated with how much money we are able to raise.

We need to make sure that we do our part to add to the overall Republican donor total in Q2 (June 30th deadline).

**[In May, more than 4,000 conservatives made a donation to my campaign. It’s our goal to double that before the end of the month. I know we have 22 days left until the end of the quarter but with the lofty goal of finding 8,000 donors this month, we simply cannot pause our efforts for a single day.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=541062d42b774508bb805880da0636ed&_e=4XtPpKOHCmTc9r2N7WtE321ENeug0_OTKGowX2npeCK72j27GHlniCKSLXMyB-j6UB9QdAyY1HDlMJNNmz5rDrLiwErTcUqptCJ4we3lI9G6RGPmauCJZ0P9u0w9phGbUzqUjkFIKa03mt1yibvHR8CThi9CXLUwbSQ0dP21Ma4nBd_U1q8r5Z8YwurIY1826K0wEvTcG_mhk8Wt5iO6HPzF6XzE1_LEvS1usQya1HGQy34fZQ71rkbN-Zho_qwC8-xFpfoPHUBa09e1afJRZoJFLPGajrEbpsyg9usi-pEssVY5PaWRtTOFcVyoZokJGdNvLXQWyyTRphTv1hog0smXMmNaGl0h1qy0gGobYuZlEwjNwoMrbQgP4afnXKL5pSXf9LHUNqUwOv6vYP0tnGql7TGqF5aLdcFQ_-FG9qAw43jrcgvzB4NkDQVTD_2vMNlR_v1pMKehU_3PqPzGnw%3D%3D)**

Thank you for your support and consideration.

Alek Skarlatos
Republican for Congress

clean_body: I’m already being outraised by my liberal opponent, and my own fundraising is down by more than 50% I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Memo : We need your immediate help to keep pace with my opponent and national democrats » Fellow Conservative, The purpose of this email to inform you of the overall fundraising goal that we’ve set for the month of June. I have to admit to you, I’m a bit nervous we’re going to fail to reach our goals and I’m hoping you can help. You see, we only have 22 days left until the end of the second fundraising quarter, which means we only have 22 days to hit our goal of raising $100,000 for the quarter. Reaching this fundraising milestone will qualify me for the National Republican Party’s “On the radar” program for promising candidates. The most recent time that I checked the numbers (this morning) we are short $30,000. We’ve done the math and | PLEASE CHIP-IN STATUS FOR dpwillis67@gmail.com: PENDING We’re falling behind my Democrat opponent in overall donations Why It’s Important : Democrats are showcasing their fundraising strength a full 1.5 years before the midterm election, and they’re funneling money to my opponent – more than $100,000 already in small dollar contributions My Ask: Our total donations are down by more than 50% this quarter vs this time last year. Last quarter my Democrat opponent, Peter DeFazio, chairman of the House Transportation Committee – and the man charged with making Biden’s $6 trillion budget a reality – raised a full 43% more than he did this time last year. That has my team on edge. Peter DeFazio knows what my team is capable of; he knows my team and I are focused and adept fundraisings, and he’s preparing early this time around. I’m because our success is directly correlated with how much money we are able to raise. We need to make sure that we do our part to add to the overall Republican donor total in Q2 (June 30th deadline). Thank you for your support and consideration. Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman.
