name: Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
subject: 6,588 votes shy of history
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
Last November, I nearly made history by becoming the first Latina Republican elected to Congress from South Texas. I fell short by 6,588 votes. I nearly made history, but 6,588 votes got in the way. Now, I'm asking for your help to make it to the top of the Hill this time around | [](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=cede8bfafdc9457fbca6d2c003734055&_e=ryP0ZccABgjcdo8p1fH2uEJwIHSbHpiAxioyosgahUcJOMPf1KbLOw6HYV3qQE9xShmMT-6TAw2GxXxMqTuk_FiCt4d8nHaH4sE4YHHJWjoerGU7HbpqE78gaY4n002XQQBDRsC6szy7r2hTOsyS1Kmj3u4fpLt2-s1Z471cZoLHZ4poSMtKzSpjzB6e4lc26jqyAN5geM04AVY6WNvW67iFR_XCNlFIOLfulmfff-XAT_gGO-vhJUKZ5NxrKJMorzJuxBI_1H0UXZDSW0veaX2MowV_yHIyRkFQfkrgAP0TXRbKcL0H0IlNTeufr2NpEsbUdGG1aiGfKeiQmdegK-7oCCUUoaCsaTnbn1XMgKmrE6cG86uegmwJcaZCe_-7Xnh72oFF1zND2QuR0t_B5k0XYREaEr0BI2NdgXG9RUUWYYs6E0jB0By66lDr2hqIYdGy8SJ4nSzBrzlN739vZav3iKURACVu0uwnLDe2G5Y%3D)
---
Fellow patriot,

Not too long ago, Latinos were _expected_ and _assumed_ to be Democrats by anyone with a passive interest in political demography. In fact, **until recently, Latinos were about as Democrat as suburbanites were Republican.**

I’m helping to change that narrative. I’m not a **“coconut”** - - brown on the outside, white on the inside - as some have called me. And I’m certainly not a **“self-hating Latino,”** as others have labeled me. My name is Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez, **a proud Latina Republican,** and I’m running for Congress in Texas’ 15th Congressional District to flip a seat RED which has never been held by a Republican in its HISTORY.

Last year, I ran for the same seat in Congress I’m running for today. We ran one heck of a campaign and fell short by **_just_ 6,588 votes.** I didn’t get to the top of the hill in 2020, but I’m a fighter - I never give up. So, I’m running again, [**and it would honor me greatly if you would consider chipping in $6 to help elect a Latina Republican from TEXAS!**](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=cede8bfafdc9457fbca6d2c003734055&_e=ryP0ZccABgjcdo8p1fH2uEJwIHSbHpiAxioyosgahUcJOMPf1KbLOw6HYV3qQE9xShmMT-6TAw2GxXxMqTuk_FiCt4d8nHaH4sE4YHHJWjoerGU7HbpqE78gaY4n002XQQBDRsC6szy7r2hTOsyS1Kmj3u4fpLt2-s1Z471cZoLHZ4poSMtKzSpjzB6e4lc26jqyAN5geM04AVY6WNvW67iFR_XCNlFIOLfulmfff-XAT_gGO-vhJUKZ5NxrKJMorzJuxBI_1H0UXZDSW0veaeJQ4TNQpg_ZJQr0zD4nTAV4PzQU1pTBKQoSedWEJEfFoXq24awC03P_0e0OJW-w5wX9CzRAU_mys2jU3ynEWwASyjgctxlo7lW1N4df44FJEGw3jDUOqEr_z64jAD-rT9frBdHA1eM6y73S7mzHlSwQo0GYM2lOnEF29IfC6bzKckoejFfAiF2r2rR_KXHd836rjPmxj3TJZKmjk-5aDgc%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS⇒ ](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=cede8bfafdc9457fbca6d2c003734055&_e=ryP0ZccABgjcdo8p1fH2uEJwIHSbHpiAxioyosgahUcJOMPf1KbLOw6HYV3qQE9xShmMT-6TAw2GxXxMqTuk_FiCt4d8nHaH4sE4YHHJWjoerGU7HbpqE78gaY4n002XQQBDRsC6szy7r2hTOsyS1Kmj3u4fpLt2-s1Z471cZoLHZ4poSMtKzSpjzB6e4lc26jqyAN5geM04AVY6WNvW67iFR_XCNlFIOLfulmfff-XAT_gGO-vhJUKZ5NxrKJMorzJuxBI_1H0UXZDSW0veaWiFswi36rfgzE4C7cppWC7YKTy5WtcH-Y8sypllCRnsbdErptJTXL-muqLyE1GhvfL4pPxAuNER-V9ycZZwomehJhqYBfqiEmlrc5IVeDfoXsFq72Lb6ZASDq_YVdZNYWNFuMXuECo_O-x3IviQbROBL98Nm9IR94oa8unOtNUhvc9RWHD-GhJ7yxw0ngLqx99N1m1Q7HsFkaUJfKJ4fr4%3D)
I’ve been endorsed by Sen. Ted Cruz, Rep. Dan Crenshaw, and Texas Right to Life among others.

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority.

In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more **brown Republican women of color.**

[**Will you help me prove a point to the Democrats that they don’t have a monopoly on women, people of color, or Latinos?**](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=cede8bfafdc9457fbca6d2c003734055&_e=ryP0ZccABgjcdo8p1fH2uEJwIHSbHpiAxioyosgahUcJOMPf1KbLOw6HYV3qQE9xShmMT-6TAw2GxXxMqTuk_FiCt4d8nHaH4sE4YHHJWjoerGU7HbpqE78gaY4n002XQQBDRsC6szy7r2hTOsyS1Kmj3u4fpLt2-s1Z471cZoLHZ4poSMtKzSpjzB6e4lc26jqyAN5geM04AVY6WNvW67iFR_XCNlFIOLfulmfff-XAT_gGO-vhJUKZ5NxrKJMorzJuxBI_1H0UXZDSW0veac0a2_W9br2-crOjkJtoDgKHbQextlCtrW0erFlkkzumeZOie8XJ7ZHbUpWTp9ZvVnqdwbDiBK9sZGwJoaobfhVhzu2NcSDa3L7fn4YZh4DfrP3JLY7mFNoAZDm3CMZXyw19DA8F_Pro2QZHLL3vRYhpvhB3gxTAa5e8uIRwLoxn6aARk81ZsZ0bqtABj1JS--rj9RgEW4uYWZOGCv4pKt4%3D)

[ HELP ME PROVE A POINT
DEMOCRATS DON'T HAVE A MONOPOLY ON LATINOS ⇒ ](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=cede8bfafdc9457fbca6d2c003734055&_e=ryP0ZccABgjcdo8p1fH2uEJwIHSbHpiAxioyosgahUcJOMPf1KbLOw6HYV3qQE9xShmMT-6TAw2GxXxMqTuk_FiCt4d8nHaH4sE4YHHJWjoerGU7HbpqE78gaY4n002XQQBDRsC6szy7r2hTOsyS1Kmj3u4fpLt2-s1Z471cZoLHZ4poSMtKzSpjzB6e4lc26jqyAN5geM04AVY6WNvW67iFR_XCNlFIOLfulmfff-XAT_gGO-vhJUKZ5NxrKJMorzJuxBI_1H0UXZDSW0veaYUTsiAQBm6ofVDUwat69bP85cbMdbr7RU1_fShlovhHzonAgWw9psijiY-lcUkicRhpcRLa1K9D82v7Vcjukk-in4X5GD5UBi0Gn-gHUnGNQ3te5F4ETm15rIcPA1p9otVRtG3rlaBnUrlgt_C_D9pzHRE1-PQ4Cmos6y39Ac8YZ8FB00NGbyu_nD_fnAlkmKuBUoG-dbmg7xlnvZugEYU%3D)
Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.”

**But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable.**

Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today.

If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, [**invest in me so I can prove to socialist Democrats that they can’t expect to act like imbeciles and get the votes of women and minorities just because they have in the past.**](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=cede8bfafdc9457fbca6d2c003734055&_e=ryP0ZccABgjcdo8p1fH2uEJwIHSbHpiAxioyosgahUcJOMPf1KbLOw6HYV3qQE9xShmMT-6TAw2GxXxMqTuk_FiCt4d8nHaH4sE4YHHJWjoerGU7HbpqE78gaY4n002XQQBDRsC6szy7r2hTOsyS1Kmj3u4fpLt2-s1Z471cZoLHZ4poSMtKzSpjzB6e4lc26jqyAN5geM04AVY6WNvW67iFR_XCNlFIOLfulmfff-XAT_gGO-vhJUKZ5NxrKJMorzJuxBI_1H0UXZDSW0veaZmJtQzjAl3sCIRt2ae2plZ8zabPJtMsY7Iy2Cr3A2SBz-aQ5sSVdhYS40vsKyTHpYx-qHfEahXPf5L1ugDobaPmLTcOKHvfmxQjHnF9Qwi0KxI-n_NrxCCyrR2lzorcspG-ra-8aAOM3PV5ZhbffUNnX2rK_yiR85DOKYfHCA-4CgyT2VNLem6PDW4YfXR1756OkEIquA1tWi-PIPPoj60%3D)

Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, **_“If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.”_**

Help me prove him right.

Thank you for your time.

Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez
Republican for Congress

[ Help Send a Latina Republican to Congress
Chip In Today! ⇒ ](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=cede8bfafdc9457fbca6d2c003734055&_e=ryP0ZccABgjcdo8p1fH2uEJwIHSbHpiAxioyosgahUcJOMPf1KbLOw6HYV3qQE9xShmMT-6TAw2GxXxMqTuk_FiCt4d8nHaH4sE4YHHJWjoerGU7HbpqE78gaY4n002XQQBDRsC6szy7r2hTOsyS1Kmj3u4fpLt2-s1Z471cZoLHZ4poSMtKzSpjzB6e4lc26jqyAN5geM04AVY6WNvW67iFR_XCNlFIOLfulmfff-XAT_gGO-vhJUKZ5NxrKJMorzJuxBI_1H0UXZDSW0veaY5Rhi0uHGMeFVhCN1NQK6cVg5db55qYwuHFWh575Ryf07ByBJHkf448wvUSGLyfzz2jK26UFiRAecdlrq9bljW03-x8wTlR2l7u0Cd6uwyNBbCt7as8i31_Tnng6GnTGs6UHUBajkRnbHx6uUxcJoglLEVGrGSnnolyaB4phnHAdZnGexVAUFp1zm6mo2SS8Tn477MDtfz5y5HZkaHFfno%3D)

As you may have heard, Republicans only need 5 seats to flip the House Republican, and to put it plainly, without picking up this seat in South Texas, we will come up short and Democrats will retain their majority. In 2020, Republicans had the “Year of the Republican Woman” when the number of Republican women in the House more than doubled. But that is not good enough. We need more! We need more brown Republican women of color. Culturally, Latinos are conservative: most of us are pro-life, pro-2nd Amendment God-fearing folks. For me and my family, voting Democrat is simply not an option when AOC is now the standard bearer of the party. But, as the saying goes in Latino communities here in South Texas, “being Democrat, it’s just what you do.” But Democrats have veered so far to the left, the Party of my parents’ generation is just unrecognizable. Consider that in 2020, Joe Biden performed 24% worse in the Rio Grande Valley than Hillary Clinton did four years earlier. South Texas is ripe for the taking, but I can’t do it alone. I cannot self-fund, and that’s why I’m asking for you to invest in my campaign today. If you’re a Latino Republican, please help me be a voice for you in Washington. If you’re not Latino, Governor Greg Abbot even proclaimed about South Texas, “If I were the Democrats, I would be very afraid right now.” Help me prove him right. Thank you for your time. Monica De La Cruz-Hernandez Republican for Congress | Paid for by Monica for Congress Don't want to receive our emails?

name: =?utf-8?Q?Sean=20Spicer?=
subject: The media ignores Hunter Biden's use of N-word
body:
Jeffrey Toobin back on TV, a Loudon teacher refuses to use pronouns and more...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/aedeb77a81f7/the-media-ignores-hunter-bidens-use-of-n-word?e=f6564bbe3b)
Logo

** Hunter Biden’s laptop shows he repeatedly used the N-word, but the media does not care...
------------------------------------------------------------

This week The Daily Mail (https://www.dailymail.co.uk/news/article-9661781/Hunter-Biden-used-n-word-multiple-times-casual-conversation-text-messages-show.html?mc_cid=72b6801679&mc_eid=UNIQID) broke story that Hunter Biden used the N-word repeatedly in texts to his lawyer. While no major media outlet (except Newsmax) covered it, Politico thought it was important to write a long piece about the White House chief of staff’s favorite soda (it’s Tab by the way — and FWIW I’m more of a Fresca guy). CNN also failed to mention it but they did announce the return of Jeffery Toobin (Google it when the kids are out of the room if you don’t know what I am referring to). I wish I could say this omission was a surprise but unfortunately the failure to hold this White House accountable has been a persistent issue.

Careers have been ruined (https://www.usatoday.com/story/entertainment/celebrities/2020/06/19/racism-celebrities-fired-for-their-racist-comments/3208619001/?mc_cid=72b6801679&mc_eid=UNIQID) over using racial slurs, yet when a member of the first family does, as long as they’re a Biden, it doesn’t matter. Got it.

** Teacher who refused to use pronouns reinstated...
------------------------------------------------------------

We have been following this story on Spicer & Co since Loudon County teacher, Tanner Cross, was first suspended for expressing in a school board meeting that he would not address children by anything other than their biological pronouns.

He joined us last night after a judge ruled that his speech was protected by the First Amendment and he was reinstated.
https://youtu.be/QBiiOBEETZU?mc_cid=72b6801679&mc_eid=UNIQID

While a lot of pundits believe that the GOP will take back the House in 2022, the results of my unofficial poll of readers last week (https://twitter.com/seanspicer/status/1400591151606996994?s=20&mc_cid=72b6801679&mc_eid=UNIQID) shows people are skeptical that Kevin McCarthy will be Speaker if they do. This week’s poll question is below.
https://twitter.com/seanspicer/status/1403067017935179780?s=20&mc_cid=72b6801679&mc_eid=UNIQID

** What I’m reading this week...
------------------------------------------------------------

Recently got a copy of Josh Hawley’s new book “The Tyranny of Big Tech.”

If you’re a Spicer & Co viewer, you know this is a topic that we’ve been covering for awhile and the more I read about it the crazier it seems.
Get a copy here (https://www.amazon.com/Tyranny-Big-Tech-Josh-Hawley/dp/1684512395?crid=6O1151EJ04S6&dchild=1&keywords=josh+hawley&qid=1623351604&sprefix=Josh+Hawley%2Caps%2C147&sr=8-1&linkCode=ll1&tag=rigwilllc-20&linkId=992edadff9fb151107fe8d48bd152fba&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl&mc_cid=72b6801679&mc_eid=UNIQID)
https://www.amazon.com/Tyranny-Big-Tech-Josh-Hawley/dp/1684512395?crid=6O1151EJ04S6&dchild=1&keywords=josh+hawley&qid=1623351604&sprefix=Josh+Hawley%2Caps%2C147&sr=8-1&linkCode=ll1&tag=rigwilllc-20&linkId=992edadff9fb151107fe8d48bd152fba&language=en_US&ref_=as_li_ss_tl&mc_cid=72b6801679&mc_eid=UNIQID

Peter,

I’m reaching out to you today to formally introduce myself and fill you in on my big announcement. My name is Major General Michael "Mick" McGuire, USAF (Ret.) and I’m a husband, a father, and a proud Arizonan.

Today, I am formally announcing my campaign for the U.S. Senate seat in Arizona. I’ll be facing Mark Kelly - Chuck Schumer’s right-hand man - [**and I need your support today in order to win this race and help Republicans WIN BACK the Senate majority!**](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=ccd3e3dd96ad4ffd9b252210049ea925&_e=nZiCY4ONcLn2Es2RQCgiNOIBWhd0LmllDr9NouXv7DzkgIGlsZep7Ws-i0nOZ-gad0T5fhWqdObRDpXdxMvs9mjIRdhafOsbwYgyvS28qsjpS0SWMKVFX3sPX8PSkz-ycDatlirEAU0agm8wB5me3xKc0RU-J7U1CHi93MjmP05lD7OCyNulfBM7TAniFydAjaVdJxki3QiZ7fNwr_Su6PZYSGuUDRY_8JNZ-hw7Kb3UlO29DqgS-_q952HgbpAW3aAyWkrPl0OdZ0XS0rjVdUxAM_36GdwdzVvYZWZzz9V3y7u3Kfo3jOV_8AdIRaEzPBWecjjEpmf11xm-F2lFuey1SN3Yg1MpUVfkS2LZ9QaUkg9nzJsFu1zH_ZhzsMqTM_OYUvNJua96CqguknWrRg%3D%3D)

[** ****JOIN MY TEAM ➤ **](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=ccd3e3dd96ad4ffd9b252210049ea925&_e=nZiCY4ONcLn2Es2RQCgiNOIBWhd0LmllDr9NouXv7DzkgIGlsZep7Ws-i0nOZ-gad0T5fhWqdObRDpXdxMvs9mjIRdhafOsbwYgyvS28qsjpS0SWMKVFX3sPX8PSkz-ycDatlirEAU0agm8wB5me3xKc0RU-J7U1CHi93MjmP05UpQY5jR8CZO2d86rlF-ejKvu20JSSnu2LiCFWjRz_qCtkT1jFPvKTTggzr-QpSk4NeWe3rsXUyyLWze1f2W7nlrifapDf1yeK0TCRku7DBL_MrNagP_eOEHvrEwKUGT-AEXRloOWSmtP3dDa4uyTC4Hl2cr-b82vX-5_-tlfxZXKdVWC8qQCBgR4v_WPP6kOABAXCDJOFuUozo_GooRvccHdnWFJblwO8qt0QICziVQ%3D%3D)
Washington is broken. There are too many politicians who are only worried about making the right decision for THEMSELVES and NOT the American people they promised to protect.

As a former F-16 pilot and retired commanding general of the Arizona National Guard, I know what it takes to lead a team and make split second decisions that is the difference between saving and losing lives.

I’m ready on day one to fight for YOU and for what’s right for this country. That means:
1. Securing our border
2. Standing for life
3. Protecting our First and Second Amendment rights and
4. Walking shoulder to shoulder with law enforcement.

Each day the Left pushes our country further left, and we need a Senator in Arizona who will be a vote for our conservative way of life. I’m that vote, Peter.

I can win this race, but I need to hear from you today. [**Will you make a contribution to my campaign for U.S. Senate? It doesn’t need to be much - even just $5 or $10 will give my campaign the momentum it needs to build a winning foundation.**](http://links.keepingamericagreatalerts.com/u/click?_t=b17b139d3aa34869835631e0135927b3&_m=ccd3e3dd96ad4ffd9b252210049ea925&_e=nZiCY4ONcLn2Es2RQCgiNOIBWhd0LmllDr9NouXv7DzkgIGlsZep7Ws-i0nOZ-gad0T5fhWqdObRDpXdxMvs9mjIRdhafOsbwYgyvS28qsjpS0SWMKVFX3sPX8PSkz-ycDatlirEAU0agm8wB5me3xKc0RU-J7U1CHi93MjmP04M7_jekJqRXYG4IPVOlcBDB15cF2TdAfaKWF64yLwqvuraMmPlD8yZxrSV6WoH1_RboNv-s0T7SZtx3A-ipb0KEotx7uat4-XXuzYweAYB7ntqACj1Gs68RqYkMkGjWBtgPpFrGTkjjqsH71NQg-yeVKORIrC-6g9lKCLQ8aS-XP_3XX6PkL5v-YmUbdYgLwZaHPqniIiGOQT1nMBJ3Am6uHCpQgZ0QepVbT9DjujZWw%3D%3D)

If I’m lucky enough to be the next U.S. Senator from Arizona I will ALWAYS fight for YOU, protect our values, and stand up for what we believe in.

Federal law requires McGuire for Arizona’s best efforts to obtain and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of any individual who contributes more than $200 in an election cycle.

clean_body: INSIDE SCOOP: JUST TALKED WITH PRESIDENT TRUMP Fellow Conservative, I just got out of my meeting with President Trump, and here’s what went down: He was pleased with the work that House Republicans and I have been doing in continuing to fight for the issues that matter the most to hardworking Americans. ✔️ Lowering taxes on middle-class families ✔️ Getting rid of regulations that harm small businesses ✔️ Standing up to the Fake News Media’s lies Are these the values that you want America’s future to represent? Or do you want a future where the liberals are the only ones calling the shots? It all comes down to this, Fellow Conservative. If you stand with me and President Trump, then you need to pitch in before the clock strikes MIDNIGHT: Thank you, Jim Banks, House Conservatives Fund Chairman Founded in 1997, the House Conservatives Fund (HCF) has been the political arm of the Republican Study Committee (RSC), the largest caucus of conservatives in Congress. For more than two decades, HCF has been pursuing its mission of electing and retaining members who are committed to our core conservative principles. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: So Sick of the Fake News Media
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Here is what they did now |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=30d31a4645&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,

You know an animal is in the corner when it starts lashing out.

**And that is exactly what we are seeing with the Democrats getting their claws out to fight back against America’s Audit in Maricopa County!**

**_70 percent of Maricopa Ballots have been recounted, and now the Democrats are getting scared!_**

My name is Mark Finchem. I am the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative, a pro-Trump Republican, a former police officer, paramedic, first responder, and Arizona business leader.

_I have been endorsed by Bernard Kerik, and I am the Conservative who will fight back against The Democrats long after America’s Audit is over!_

We are in for the long haul.

**One audit isn’t enough. We have to see through to Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Michigan, and even Georgia!**

**_And then we need to protect every election after that or the Democrats will never lose!_**

This is why I am running for Secretary of State in Arizona! I will protect the elections from the Steal and make sure that Arizona is the Red State it REALLY is!

[_Donate TODAY to protect America’s and Arizona’s elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=501803e2a7&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6a3d87159f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Let me take you on a tour of the Leftist mania in the media right now!

**“Experts call it a ‘clown show?” What experts? You mean the Democrats who don’t want to lose their precious Joe Biden win?**

**_When the words are vague, you know its fake!_**
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d81da8235e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **538 reports that the Audit is an “inquisition.”**

_Yes, the Spanish Inquisition was famous for their methodical, filmed counting of ballots. That’s what it was, fake news media, keep telling yourselves that._

**_I have never in my life seen people get so angry at something that should make them happy._**

If you are so confident that the election is legitimate, why do you get something at so angry at something, which would, in theory, prove you right?

_Yep folks, definitely nothing to see here!_
[_Join me in combatting media bias against election integrity by donating today!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=250b15a3a2&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5649be0c52&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Ok, I have a question.

**If Audits were such a big risk then why did Biden just propose an 80 billion dollar tax hike to increase tax audits?**

Audits only cause “lasting damage” if you’re on the wrong side of the law.

**This is ridiculous and this only highlights the idiocy of the Democrats across the board.**

**_They really think Americans will fall for this crap._**

Well, good news here folks, we persist, we find more evidence of fraud by the day, and President Trump is on our side!
---
|
---
| This grass-roots movement is spreading folks and its get in or get out.

**President Trump is on the side of America’s Audit.**

Are you?

[_Donate TODAY to join the movement sweeping Conservative America and help me win Secretary of State of Arizona!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=322c15e198&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=586377c631&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7d3072de2a&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE

| |
---

You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=575c5bcf4d) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=575c5bcf4d).
